body:
| | |
---
Team – My finance director just told me we need to raise $15,000 by Sunday to get our fundraising back on track before closing the books on Thursday. With our Senate majority split 50-50, falling short is not an option. Everything we've raised for this quarter will go public, giving Republicans and potential opponents a look into our campaign. Super PACs and special interest groups are already flooding New Hampshire with attack ads. And while we can’t match their big bucks and dark money, we can show the strength of this campaign through grassroots supporters like you, friend. **[That's why I'm reaching out on the weekend to ask if you can chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us hit our weekend goal. Whether it's $5, $20, or $50, any amount makes a difference in a race this big.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36416632/308071216/-1669436104?refcode=e20210925_mwh-wkdgoal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTZkOWQ0Ni0wYzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMke21Xlp06XyC82M-0yXbk_dvtQltfsO4OBZi5Rz6g=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36416633/308071217/-1669436104?refcode=e20210925_mwh-wkdgoal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTZkOWQ0Ni0wYzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMke21Xlp06XyC82M-0yXbk_dvtQltfsO4OBZi5Rz6g=)

name: Tom Nelson
subject: Are you up to the task?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Here’s the state of this race:
* More candidates have entered the race, increasing the competition.
* Various polls have come out, including one showing we’re leading Ron Johnson. Here’s a graphic that I’m sure you’ve seen a few times to remind you ↓↓↓

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36420808/308078340/594431030?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210925_1_1&refcode2=96ad8340-111e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFkODM0MC0xMTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PoM-0M2djoyk31BIr9lSVej9aWm3lRxJlTs51xVi2Ds=)
* Our opponent, Ron Johnson has continued to spread dangerous conspiracies and lies on COVID and election “fraud” — _very on brand for everyone’s crazy uncle in the Senate._

With all of this happening, our opponents, dark money groups, and grassroots donors are clamoring for a viable campaign. We need to prove without a shadow of a doubt that we are the campaign that will defeat Ron Johnson — if we don’t and we have a weak report that shows signs of slowing down, we lose our momentum.

[To make sure that doesn't happen, we’re aiming to raise $30,000 from 3,000 donors by Thursday at midnight, _our Q3 FEC deadline_. Chip in today to help us reach this goal and prove that our campaign is ready to take on Ron Johnson >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36420812/308078343/594431030?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210925_1_1&refcode2=96ad8340-111e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFkODM0MC0xMTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PoM-0M2djoyk31BIr9lSVej9aWm3lRxJlTs51xVi2Ds=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

body:
| Peter, we couldn’t be more GRATEFUL. Joe Biden has bravely led us through the pandemic -- mandating vaccines and doing all he can to protect our health.

Even in the face of relentless Republican attacks, smears, and threats to impeach him, Joe Biden hasn’t wavered in his determination.

So we’re sending him an open letter to THANK him for his dedication to safeguarding public health.

**[Chip in $1 to sign our open letter »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36421251/308078831/-1830688825?amount=1&refcode=UD_20210925_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYWY5ODQ2LTExMWUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WZpdmJjX_Ja3P4MNAQTKSPqwAj5CBoFR7My0ejMZuSA=)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36421253/308078832/-1830688825?amount=1&refcode=UD_20210925_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYWY5ODQ2LTExMWUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WZpdmJjX_Ja3P4MNAQTKSPqwAj5CBoFR7My0ejMZuSA=) | [CHIP IN $1 TO SIGN THE OPEN LETTER »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36421255/308078833/-1830688825?amount=1&refcode=UD_20210925_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYWY5ODQ2LTExMWUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WZpdmJjX_Ja3P4MNAQTKSPqwAj5CBoFR7My0ejMZuSA=)

**1,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE NOON TOMORROW** **TO: President Joe Biden
FROM: Peter
RE: Your Handling of COVID-19**

President Biden,

Since the start of your presidency, you’ve never shied away from taking bold action to protect the American people.

Even when your action has made you a top target of Republican attacks and outright lies, _you’ve never let that deter you._

**[That’s why I’m rushing in $1 to UNITEDemocrats -- to thank you for all your hard work, I’m chipping in to protect your Democratic Majorities and safeguard the progress you’ve boldly made.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36421257/308078834/-1830688825?amount=1&refcode=UD_20210925_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYWY5ODQ2LTExMWUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WZpdmJjX_Ja3P4MNAQTKSPqwAj5CBoFR7My0ejMZuSA=)** | [CHIP IN $1 TO SIGN THE OPEN LETTER »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36421259/308078835/-1830688825?amount=1&refcode=UD_20210925_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYWY5ODQ2LTExMWUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WZpdmJjX_Ja3P4MNAQTKSPqwAj5CBoFR7My0ejMZuSA=)

After months and months of inaction by the Trump Administration, we’re all so grateful to have a president taking this pandemic seriously.

It’s refreshing to have a president who listens to medical professionals and believes in science at the helm of our country’s pandemic response.

**This colossal step forward wouldn’t have been possible without a Democrat as president and Democratic Majorities in the House and Senate.**

clean_body: | Peter, we couldn’t be more GRATEFUL. Joe Biden has bravely led us through the pandemic -- mandating vaccines and doing all he can to protect our health. Even in the face of relentless Republican attacks, smears, and threats to impeach him, Joe Biden hasn’t wavered in his determination. So we’re sending him an open letter to THANK him for his dedication to safeguarding public health. = = | = 1,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE NOON TOMORROW TO: President Joe Biden FROM: Peter RE: Your Handling of COVID-19 President Biden, Since the start of your presidency, you’ve never shied away from taking bold action to protect the American people. Even when your action has made you a top target of Republican attacks and outright lies, you’ve never let that deter you. = | = After months and months of inaction by the Trump Administration, we’re all so grateful to have a president taking this pandemic seriously. It’s refreshing to have a president who listens to medical professionals and believes in science at the helm of our country’s pandemic response. name: Ralph Northam
subject: Democrats can't lose the momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1lU5inpiWTs3oo9a42B9kIh4LW6G4sRZSAX1KGDXPY=/z9Dc6XXl5nzoitNYdwGwMgYB52CfRtcvRXO7XINVBZo=?refcode=20210925_RN_TRM)
---
Friend, When I ran for Governor in 2017, Virginians turned out to vote in **HUGE** numbers, and Democrats won big. With Glenn Youngkin promising to end all of our progress, it's critical that we do it again. Friend, there is no time to waste. Terry is up against an extreme right-wing culture warrior with a bottomless bank account and the support of national Republicans, including Donald Trump. **[Terry McAuliffe is in the final weeks of his campaign, and he has a critical filing deadline coming up at the end of September. Will you chip in any amount right now to power Terry's voter mobilization efforts?](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1lU5inpiWTs3oo9a42B9kIh4LW6G4sRZSAX1KGDXPY=/z9Dc6XXl5nzoitNYdwGwMgYB52CfRtcvRXO7XINVBZo=?refcode=20210925_RN_TRM)** The bad news is that we're seeing reports of waning enthusiasm amongst Virginia Democrats -- and this is coming at a time when poll after poll shows Glenn Youngkin with momentum on his side. But it's not too late to turn the tide, friend. I swore an oath to support and defend the U.S. Constitution when I was elected to Congress. And that's exactly what I'm doing now, fighting the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) for labeling the U.S. Constitution "harmful and difficult to view."
This is ridiculous. And I've introduced legislation to prohibit the National Archives from putting woke warning labels on any document drafted in whole or in part by a Founding Father of the United States.
The left is engaging in a Marxist cultural revolution, attempting to undermine our founding and our history and our sense of what it means to be an American. These little steps, slapping warning labels on our founding documents, are all part of their effort to tear down our founding principles, and it must be stopped.
My bill makes sure the National Archives is prohibited from including content warnings alongside founding documents of the United States. Whoever decided to put those warning labels up in the first place should also resign.
Know that as long as I am in Congress I will stand up for our Constitution, our Declaration of Independence, and the principles of our Founding.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I went on offense against President Biden's open border policies. Joe is willfully abdicating his duty to uphold the laws of our country, and it's putting America's sovereignty at risk. I also introduced legislation to force the National Archives to remove harmful content warnings on our founding documents. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | JOE DOESN'T CARE | == | == Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are flooding across our southern border every month. Women and children are being left stranded in the desert by human smugglers and drug cartels. Thousands of people are camping out in blistering heat underneath a bridge. All of this is a result of Biden's open border policies. And the worst part? Joe isn't doing anything to solve it. | | | == | Why isn't he doing anything? Because he doesn't care. Democrats in Congress don't care. In fact, every single policy they propose leads to MORE illegal immigration. They've rescinded Trump Administration policies that discouraged illegal immigration and they've stopped all enforcement of our immigration laws. That's why we need to fight back, and vote every single one of them out of office. We need to take back control of Washington, and that's exactly what I'm fighting to do. Are you with me? | | | == | | | | | | | | PROTECTING OUR FOUNDING DOCUMENTS | == | == I swore an oath to support and defend the U.S. Constitution when I was elected to Congress. And that's exactly what I'm doing now, fighting the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) for labeling the U.S. Constitution "harmful and difficult to view." This is ridiculous. And I've introduced legislation to prohibit the National Archives from putting woke warning labels on any document drafted in whole or in part by a Founding Father of the United States. The left is engaging in a Marxist cultural revolution, attempting to undermine our founding and our history and our sense of what it means to be an American. These little steps, slapping warning labels on our founding documents, are all part of their effort to tear down our founding principles, and it must be stopped. My bill makes sure the National Archives is prohibited from including content warnings alongside founding documents of the United States. Whoever decided to put those warning labels up in the first place should also resign. Know that as long as I am in Congress I will stand up for our Constitution, our Declaration of Independence, and the principles of our Founding. | | | == | | | | | | I NEED YOUR HELP | | | == | We are approaching the end of the quarter, when I need to send my fundraising report to the FEC. Every month, Democrats are still outpacing Republicans in fundraising. Their woke celebrity donors and big tech allies want to keep Democrats in control, and they are scared that they will lose control of Congress next November. That's why I want to make the swamp socialists shake with fear with my highest quarterly fundraising report yet. Democrats can't stand when I raise money, because they know that I will use those resources to go on offense against their socialist agenda. I'm going on offense on their open border policies, on their push for a massive $3.5 TRILLION TAX AND SPENDING bill, and on every socialist scheme they cook up in Washington, D.C. But I need your help to do that. I can't win this fight with you sitting on the sidelines. Are you ready? | | | == | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS FOX NEWS: == WSJ: == TOWN HALL: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | | | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

Team --

Here's an update with some photos of where we've been this past month. You may even see some faces you recognize! Please read it, then consider [**chipping in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441116/308090348/975127612?refcode=em-92521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODYxNzBlYS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XjljCDhNrSeujoquo32OpRtpoBdY-mdZUtBRTNPPlvM=) to our end-of-month deadline.

**September has been a challenging month.** Kids are going back to school during the resurgence of the COVID-19 pandemic, and there's increased political division on the state and federal level.

I'm sure you're feeling worn out, too. But there's too much important work to be done to wait around for someone who is supposed to lead -- to actually show some real Iowa leadership. I'm not expecting anyone to give us permission to step up. We don't need it.

**Right now what we need more than ever before is to come together for a better future for all Iowans.**

That's why meeting with Iowans across the state gives me hope and it's what I know you'll see in the pictures below. And if I haven't already, I hope I get the opportunity to see you in person soon.

More soon,

Ras Smith
Democrat for Governor

**I visited with Clinton County Democrats, and was joined by my friend Rep. Mary Wolfe.**

**The Polk County Democrats' Steak Fry is always the place to be. Thanks to all who made the trip to support.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441119/308090371/975127612?refcode=em-92521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODYxNzBlYS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XjljCDhNrSeujoquo32OpRtpoBdY-mdZUtBRTNPPlvM=)
**I had the chance to stop by the new Dupaco Voices Building in Dubuque and took a brief moment from the campaign trail to enjoy the beautiful Iowa sky.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441120/308090372/975127612?refcode=em-92521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODYxNzBlYS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XjljCDhNrSeujoquo32OpRtpoBdY-mdZUtBRTNPPlvM=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441121/308090373/975127612?refcode=em-92521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODYxNzBlYS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XjljCDhNrSeujoquo32OpRtpoBdY-mdZUtBRTNPPlvM=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441122/308090374/975127612?refcode=em-92521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODYxNzBlYS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XjljCDhNrSeujoquo32OpRtpoBdY-mdZUtBRTNPPlvM=)

clean_body: Meeting with Iowans across the state gives me hope. | = Team -- Here's an update with some photos of where we've been this past month. You may even see some faces you recognize! Please read it, then consider = to our end-of-month deadline. September has been a challenging month. Kids are going back to school during the resurgence of the COVID-19 pandemic, and there's increased political division on the state and federal level. I'm sure you're feeling worn out, too. But there's too much important work to be done to wait around for someone who is supposed to lead -- to actually show some real Iowa leadership. I'm not expecting anyone to give us permission to step up. We don't need it. Right now what we need more than ever before is to come together for a better future for all Iowans. That's why meeting with Iowans across the state gives me hope and it's what I know you'll see in the pictures below. And if I haven't already, I hope I get the opportunity to see you in person soon. More soon, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor | = I visited with Clinton County Democrats, and was joined by my friend Rep. Mary Wolfe. = The Polk County Democrats' Steak Fry is always the place to be. Thanks to all who made the trip to support. = I had the chance to stop by the new Dupaco Voices Building in Dubuque and took a brief moment from the campaign trail to enjoy the beautiful Iowa sky. = A quick interview in Perry turned into an hour-long roundtable about courage, being "Bold about the Basics," and building an Iowa that works for everyone. I love this state! = I was proud to get out and knock doors for Andrea Phillips. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: This race looks close

body:
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441146/308090481/-2023814932?refcode=20210925.3_GW_9FH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGExNGM4NS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x99-xiAHAZo_habwlJDTkWbmq4ETFIGy3UWJFmLAibI=)

| | Derek,

Former Education Secretary Betsy DeVos and Glenn Youngkin have a lot in common. Both are extremists who’d rather gut our public schools than fund them, and both are willing to team up with special interests and pour money into our elections. And now they’re joining forces to flip Virginia red.

Extremists and national special interests like DeVos and her allies shouldn’t be allowed to buy elections. We have a chance to stop them — _but polls are showing a tight race._

Terry can fight back against his opponent’s extremist backers by building the largest grassroots army in the history of Virginia.

[**_I’m reaching out today to ask you to help Terry stop extremism and become Virginia’s next governor. Will you chip-in and help Democrats win this crucial race?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441147/308090490/-2023814932?refcode=20210925.3_GW_9FH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGExNGM4NS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x99-xiAHAZo_habwlJDTkWbmq4ETFIGy3UWJFmLAibI=)

Extremists have already gutted reproductive healthcare in states like Texas, and we can’t have that happen in Virginia. In next year’s midterm, Democrats have to keep our majorities and defend critical governor’s races in states across the country, and it starts now with Virginia.

**_[We have to win. So please, chip in any amount to power Terry’s campaign through to the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441148/308090491/-2023814932?refcode=20210925.3_GW_9FH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGExNGM4NS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x99-xiAHAZo_habwlJDTkWbmq4ETFIGy3UWJFmLAibI=)_**

Let’s get it done,

Gretchen Whitmer | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441149/308090493/-2023814932?refcode=20210925.3_GW_9FH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGExNGM4NS0xNzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x99-xiAHAZo_habwlJDTkWbmq4ETFIGy3UWJFmLAibI=)**

Derek — with just 5 days until the FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, we’ll make this quick: Republican fundraising outpaced Democrats by more than $10 million in the last reporting period. _That’s a lot._ And as one of the leading House Democrats in defending our congressional majorities, Adam’s fundraising numbers have a real impact on our ability to defend battleground incumbents, contest toss-up races, and expand our majorities. That’s a lot. And as one of the leading House Democrats in defending our congressional majorities, Adam’s fundraising numbers have a real impact on our ability to defend battleground incumbents, contest toss-up races, and expand our majorities. The midterm elections are heating up, and hitting our goal by next week’s deadline will make sure we don’t fall further behind the GOP, whose dark money donors are prepared to pour hundreds of millions of dollars into next year’s elections. Can Adam count on you to pitch in today, before the FEC deadline? It will go a long way in helping him defend our democracy against Republicans who will say and spend anything to take back the House and Senate majorities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Our majorities are only as powerful as our grassroots supporters. Thank you for helping Adam stand up to the demagogues in Donald Trump’s GOP, defend our democracy and fight for working people. We are very much in your debt. — Team Schiff Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

---

Austin is the most Democratic leaning city in Texas, but is represented by five far-right members of Congress -- that's just ridiculous. But the GOP has sliced up our community using their favorite divide-and-conquer tactic: gerrymandering.

**Due to high population growth, we're set to receive a new district, which redistricting experts believe will be "Democratic-leaning."** That's the district I'm running in. We can't leave anything to chance, we must hold the house in 2022.

**Texas is ground zero for voter suppression and dismantling of reproductive healthcare rights which is likely to propagate to Americans across this country. In fact just this week, Florida GOP lawmakers introduced a copycat bill. The GOP won't stop unless we stand up to them.**

Our campaign is on the ground in the 11th largest city in the country, where _we must mobilize voters and let them know what is happening._ The most effective way to do that is to meet voters at their door. If we’re going to succeed, we need people like you to help us get there.

[**Will you watch my short video, then chip in $3 toward my end-of-quarter goal? We need to raise $50,000 before Thursday, and we've got a ways to go. Anything you can give helps. Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36441397/308091526/280482620?refcode=em-92521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2MyMGUzZi0xOTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AtqgZPJaxqPzi9BREBEOnh83ZATb64qBOqefHXwqoCo=)

Hi, Peter. It’s Lauren again.

Earlier this week, I sent a note about the importance of protecting reproductive healthcare -- and this team answered the call.

Women’s reproductive choices should be between a woman and their doctor, and Alex knows that this issue is top of mind, especially in light of the restrictive law enacted in Texas.

But as we continue to fight to protect reproductive rights, we’re falling behind on our end-of-quarter goal. This campaign can’t lose any momentum with so much at stake.

**[By tonight, we need to raise $2,311 more from online grassroots donations to stay on track. name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: I am writing to respectfully ask if you can make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign for Senate before his official FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When the helicopter I was co-piloting was shot down over Iraq, my Army buddies defended the perimeter to protect me and the other wounded.
#

$3.
That’s the contribution I am asking you to make to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before his official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close. If that’s all you need to get it done, use this link:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210925-1**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210925-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1382_6688874_Zs9L2d&akid=1382%2E6688874%2EZs9L2d)
Otherwise, I want to talk a little bit about the importance of a good team.
When the helicopter I was co-piloting was shot down over Iraq, my Army buddies defended the perimeter to protect me and the other wounded. That’s what you do in the military: you guard the perimeter to safeguard the core of every unit.
I have used that same outlook as a U.S. Senator — I’ve worked hard to protect and serve both my country and my constituents.
It’s also why I believe that we need more veterans in Congress. Veterans approach public service differently than politicians. We're trained to be solution-oriented. Veterans are more likely to put aside differences in pursuit of common goals.
That’s one of the reasons I’m emailing to ask you to support Mark Kelly today.
Mark set a goal of 50,000 donations before this critical, FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end. So I am hoping you can help him — because he needs to to win. He can’t do this alone.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign for U.S. Senate before his official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close in less than one week?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210925-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1382_6688874_Zs9L2d&akid=1382%2E6688874%2EZs9L2d)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210925-1-subs&t=21&refcode2=1382_6688874_Zs9L2d&akid=1382%2E6688874%2EZs9L2d)**

clean_body: When the helicopter I was co-piloting was shot down over Iraq, my Army buddies defended the perimeter to protect me and the other wounded. $3. That’s the contribution I am asking you to make to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before his official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close. If that’s all you need to get it done, use this link: Otherwise, I want to talk a little bit about the importance of a good team. When the helicopter I was co-piloting was shot down over Iraq, my Army buddies defended the perimeter to protect me and the other wounded. That’s what you do in the military: you guard the perimeter to safeguard the core of every unit. I have used that same outlook as a U.S. Senator — I’ve worked hard to protect and serve both my country and my constituents. It’s also why I believe that we need more veterans in Congress. Veterans approach public service differently than politicians. We're trained to be solution-oriented. Veterans are more likely to put aside differences in pursuit of common goals. That’s one of the reasons I’m emailing to ask you to support Mark Kelly today. Mark set a goal of 50,000 donations before this critical, FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end. So I am hoping you can help him — because he needs to to win. He can’t do this alone. Let me explain

Hey Peter, this is Rep. Mark Takano. I’m reaching out because I have a really important favor to ask you.

[**Can you chip in just $1 (that's not a mistake or a typo) to our progressive movement right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36442918/308099061/446234574?amount=1&amounts=1,2,3,4,5&refcode=MTFC_20210925_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTA1ZjhiNi0xYjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTY9O70okRVG4jTEcL5XK7MR8FM0KDPodhbpEAilnRo=)

Let me explain:

From the start, this campaign was built by grassroots activists and everyday Americans who stepped up in small but important ways to help elect a gay, Japanese-American, teacher, and progressive (me!) to Congress.

Mike Garcia uses corporate PACs to hit his goals, but I don't take a dime from them. I want to make sure Mike knows you can run a winning campaign without having to sell your soul to do it. This is our chance to prove to everyone the power of our campaign and grassroots donors over special interest cash. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I need your help right now, more than ever. This campaign is funded by small-dollar donors, so big deadlines like this one are absolutely crucial to making sure we have the resources to get our message out early and often. We all know by now that Mike Garcia has wholly abandoned our district to stand alongside right-wing radicals like Majorie Taylor-Greene. It's time to get CA-25 the support and dedication we deserve. Our families and friends have worked too hard during these times to have selfish extremists making decisions for us in Congress. Please help hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. We have a long way to go but I know we can do it together. = We need you more than ever before -- the stakes have never been higher. Thank you. \-- Christy = = *

name: Team Warner
subject: Battleground Hampton Roads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Hampton Roads region is emerging as one of the most critical Virginia battlegrounds.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36443144/308099631/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE4ODZiNi0xYzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=53uR9oyojRxHdlkIbu-fTYYXBrdVgKlR830AnxF9k0Q=&emci=5afda2c3-6c1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=8f1886b6-1c1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, More than a million people live in the Hampton Roads region in southeastern Virginia. And while it was once mostly red, this area is emerging as one of the most critical Virginia battlegrounds. That’s why Senator Warner asked us to reach out for your help in protecting critical Democratic House of Delegate seats in Hampton Roads. **_[We’ve elected some incredible Democratic champions in Hampton Roads -- but our progress is at risk in November. Will you contribute $5 or anything you can to reelect our Delegates Alex Askew, Nancy Guy, and Martha Mugler and help keep Virginia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36443145/308099632/1709899158?refcode=mw_em_210925_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE4ODZiNi0xYzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=53uR9oyojRxHdlkIbu-fTYYXBrdVgKlR830AnxF9k0Q=)_** **Alex Askew** is the son of a public school teacher in Virginia Beach -- and he defeated his GOP challenger with only 51% of the vote in 2019. Now, that same Republican is back for a rematch -- and it is imperative that we don’t give an inch with the House of Delegates majority at risk. **Nancy Guy** emerged victorious after one of the closest elections in Virginia in 2019. After a recount, _she won her seat by just 41 votes_. This year will surely be another nail-biter -- and it’s up to us to ensure that Nancy has the resources she needs for this must-win reelection in 2021. **Martha Mugler** won a retiring Republican’s seat in 2019 -- and she needs our support to hold on to this crucial seat in the next election. A native of Hampton, Martha brings a lifelong passion for education and her deep understanding of the communities that make up the 91st District to the House of Delegates -- and we can’t afford to let this pivotal seat fall back into GOP hands. **_[Will you make a $5 contribution now to reelect these Hampton Roads Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36443146/308099633/1709899158?refcode=mw_em_210925_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE4ODZiNi0xYzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=53uR9oyojRxHdlkIbu-fTYYXBrdVgKlR830AnxF9k0Q=)_** Thank you, Team Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36443147/308099634/1709899158?refcode=mw_em_210925_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE4ODZiNi0xYzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=53uR9oyojRxHdlkIbu-fTYYXBrdVgKlR830AnxF9k0Q=)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Curing the Hate-Filled Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
I doubt you read the garbage published by the leftist Orlando Sentinel, and I’ll admit I rarely do either
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Vb1p6N9p73KYB892fIsnNoVA/LzktA1VAPRRZHfa892SMQaOw)
Patriot,

Since I announced that I tested positive for COVID-19, the Left has been going nuts, acting like it’s some ongoing party to mock me as they publicly hope for me to “lose” my battle with this virus.

While that doesn’t bother me, this does:

That’s a screenshot from a site put together by leftist activists to CELEBRATE the deaths of Americans who have died from COVID. **There are hundreds of these entries!**

It’s disgusting and it serves no purpose other than to foment animosity and further our division.

Not only are they cheering the deaths of mothers, fathers, sons and daughters, **they are harassing the surviving family members on Facebook all because the people who passed away were opposed to the COVID “vaccine.”**
| | [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO WASHINGTON](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Vb1p6N9p73KYB892fIsnNoVA/LzktA1VAPRRZHfa892SMQaOw)
---

Democrats have created a divide in our nation that vividly brings George Washington’s warnings to life.

In 1796, Washington penned his farewell address that strongly warned Americans about the “baneful effects of the spirit of the party.” Our first president wrote about partisanship and factionalism:
_“The alternate domination of one faction over another, sharpened by the spirit of revenge, natural to party dissension, which in different ages and countries has perpetrated the most horrid enormities, is itself a frightful despotism.”_
Now, I’ll be the first to admit that I don’t pull any punches in going after inept “leaders”, prominent leftists, Do-Nothing Republicans and terrorist sympathizers – but when I attack, **I do so with facts to highlight their wrongdoing, corruption and hypocrisy**.
| [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO WASHINGTON](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Vb1p6N9p73KYB892fIsnNoVA/LzktA1VAPRRZHfa892SMQaOw)
---

I don’t go after private citizens with no positions of power to abuse.

Americans who aren’t in power are the people who we have a duty to sit down with and educate – **not fight**.

They are our neighbors, our family members, our friends and co-workers.

We don’t insult them, and we certainly don’t cheer when they’re down or ill.

We don’t applaud their deaths.

When I get to Congress, I’m going to prove that **you can still be hard-hitting, and you can be aggressive, but you can do it in a way that will persuade the masses on the other side and shake them loose from their Democrat-induced trance**.

That’s how we win, and that’s how we get America back on track!

With five days left until the end of the quarter, [**I hope you choose to support my campaign today and give me a chance to show them how it’s done!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Vb1p6N9p73KYB892fIsnNoVA/LzktA1VAPRRZHfa892SMQaOw)

Thanks so much.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer
| [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO WASHINGTON](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Vb1p6N9p73KYB892fIsnNoVA/LzktA1VAPRRZHfa892SMQaOw)
---

Derek,

In a few moments, **[I’m going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Common Good VA ahead of our end-of-month deadline.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mirHjQmrNc1AIApd7WBN4HSZdJGbbZLJHpu4Lx_NbN0wYrwNITtmfr-BWbZHAkUx_g6fwFlw1L372v8zonZEMKQHURLh3tUqurDgXRKkMthaYwh3295QLg3-aWHhz_XbMcptElsJxQBmnfhGRFoz8xawqNirsRCAWnl1CxEmNzl5GpUdp3ohqiLGEK4CzcDk2OVxb_btOAq7FItdFD4AHXEnFa3XDqRPb9qPlpdGz4_wfOdf8dIL2DW8QLcIkrEStUPgGLpKi8KAZVT484vm0EvTg1z2m_8zVCb2mxERBE-P8/3fm/PQRfPqi7SGS1g9cESAfJ-g/h1/wdgndnCXxtXOSwLbPmI2GqtC-WrA2AztlAoWA2Kv548)** First, let me explain why your support matters so much.

**Voting rights are under attack here in Arizona and across the country, and I’m running for Governor to ensure folks are able to make their voices heard.** Every day, I’m standing up for our democratic values, and to be honest, I don’t want to have to worry about fundraising goals.

Running for office can be stressful, especially when I’m under constant attack just for doing my job. I’m not complaining — I know that’s what I signed up for. But support from folks like you makes this work so much easier.

**[I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation today to keep our campaign strong. clean_body: | | | Derek, In a few moments, First, let me explain why your support matters so much. Voting rights are under attack here in Arizona and across the country, and I’m running for Governor to ensure folks are able to make their voices heard. Every day, I’m standing up for our democratic values, and to be honest, I don’t want to have to worry about fundraising goals. Running for office can be stressful, especially when I’m under constant attack just for doing my job. I’m not complaining — I know that’s what I signed up for. But support from folks like you makes this work so much easier. Any amount makes a difference, truly. I’m grateful to be in this fight with you. — Katie | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Team Malcolm
subject: wealthy, self-funded opponents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Anybody who can cut their campaign a six-figure check is clearly out of touch with the challenges working-class folks face
#

**$1,007,583**
That's how much money Jeff Bartos, Malcolm's far-right Republican opponent, reported raising last quarter.
**$440,000**
That's how much Jeff loaned his campaign last quarter. Almost half a million dollars of his own money to try and buy this seat!
**$3**
That's how much we're asking you to donate ahead of Malcolm's FEC deadline next week to elect a real working-class champion as Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator.
We can't stress this enough: Anybody who can cut their campaign a six-figure check is clearly out of touch with the challenges working-class folks face.
People who know our experience best ought to be the ones making the decisions that affect us.
$3 may not seem like the kind of money that can compete with our opponent's self-funding, but by the time you read this sentence, someone else has already chipped in.
Now they're hoping you'll do the same. Because that's how we're going to win this race — together.
And we need all hands on deck to compete against our wealthy, self-funded opponents.
[So we have to ask: friend, can you make a $3 donation today to elect Malcolm Kenyatta? We're counting on an overwhelming number of small-dollar donations from working people ahead of our federally mandated fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36443857/308101694/-353695395?refcode2=90614116-1f1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210925-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDYxNDExNi0xZjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DFDN2wzK5cF5VmtxwJQoiOzeRRDvfqRZfJJ9H7RHMFY=)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Is there anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to our campaign today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Our FEC deadline is in 5 days, and it’s the biggest test of our campaign yet.
#

Hi there,
It’s Cheri. I know it’s the weekend, so I’ll keep this quick.
Is there anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to our campaign today?
Our FEC deadline is in 5 days, and it’s the biggest test of our campaign yet. If we don’t close the quarter strong, our opponents will likely jump at the opportunity to attack us.
Truthfully, we’re short of where we want to be right now, but if we get a surge of support from people like you today, we can get back on track.
[**Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount to our campaign today to help us pick up the pace on fundraising? Hitting our goal before the FEC deadline is critical if we’re going to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat and hold Democrats’ majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36443996/308102215/1741212721?refcode2=decd2ecf-1f1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210925-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWNkMmVjZi0xZjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UQc2Y4mNggY9r5DCBbmIQVKxx-wXcjKFTyx9W5oIas=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Charter School Authorizer Board Decision – And What it Means for School Choice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/charterschool?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=28cfedd6c7&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1c0f81ac0e&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=af9a59cfa5&e=5703353baa)
---
| Friend,

Imagine if we were required to shop for groceries in a particular store because of where we happened to live?

It would be absurd, yet that is pretty much the way the public education system operates in Mississippi. Moms and dads have little choice over the education their child receives – unless they are able to locate to a particular zip code or go private.

Charter schools were supposed to change this. Paid for with public money, but run independently, Charter Schools would give everyone opportunities that rich people previously had.

Tragically, this has not happened for one fundamental reason:**the Charter School Authorizer Board has only ever approved seven such schools to open in the entire state. **

Last week, the Board failed to approve a single new school – despite the fact that in June we were told five new applications were in the pipeline.
---
|
---
Big Brother probably would have opposed school choice, too.
|
The Board seems to blame the legislation, which they say does not mandate them to encourage and incubate would-be applicants. (It might not mandate them to incubate new applicants, but where does it stipulate that they shouldn’t?)

Others point out that we have had endless tinkering with Charter School law in this state already, and that the real problem is an unwillingness to have more independent schools.

Inertia always comes with a bureaucratic excuse.

**Those that will pay the price for last week’s appalling failure are kids in Jackson, Greenville, Natchez, and elsewhere who will not be getting the education they have a right to expect** – and whose life chances will suffer as a direct consequence.

The stark truth is that there has been very little progress on school choice in our state in a very long time.

At the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we believe that the fight for school choice has become urgent. It is one of the most important policy battles America faces. ** Now is the time for a fundamentally different approach if we are going to actually win.**

---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5d2a84b2d5&e=5703353baa)
---
California has been catastrophically mismanaged by a succession of Leftist leaders. If California is indicative of where the rest of America is going, the US is heading towards disaster. Written for the UK's "The Telegraph" by Douglas Carswell
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bbe461cc86&e=5703353baa)
---
Short-term stimulus checks and their long-term effects.
"Long-term prosperity does not come from stimulus checks. Prosperity comes when free markets are permitted to ebb and flow."

|
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2789c5e0e7&e=5703353baa)
---
Victory for campus free speech! Administrators at Ole Miss tried to punish Young Americans for Freedom members for celebrating the anniversary of the fall of the Berlin Wall without permission. The irony was apparently lost on Ole Miss – until we threatened to sue them!
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=514e6dfc86&e=5703353baa)
---
Douglas Carswell stopped by the SuperTalk studio to break down the failures of the Charter School advisory board to approve any new charter schools in the Magnolia State this year and to explain how he thinks we should move forward in cutting income tax.
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6d75472835&e=5703353baa)
---
In the name of combating misinformation, the Mississippi State Board of Medical Licensure recently issued a new policy that vaguely prohibits medical misinformation from being spread by doctors, particularly on social media.

name: Derek Marshall
subject: 5 more days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

We’re approaching a very important deadline for our campaign. **In just five days, we will have to report all of our fundraising data to the Federal Election Commission.** The FEC will publish our campaign numbers and everyone will be able to see how we’ve performed over the last three months.

Why are these numbers so important? Because they demonstrate our strength and viability as a campaign. Strong numbers prove that we have what it takes to get all the way to a victory, and the resources to back it up. [**Will you invest in our campaign today so we can have an impressive showing in 5 days time?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36444466/308104839/-1805461028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFkNzAwNS0yMjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYp_TUUWGC6vlhtWD70InH3vZ4n-dM1fBFf87MaCJpA=)
We’ve already started the hard work of organizing our communities out here in California’s 8th district, all thanks to contributions from our grassroots donors. [**Now we need your help again to get over this next finish line. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36444471/308104842/-1805461028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFkNzAwNS0yMjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYp_TUUWGC6vlhtWD70InH3vZ4n-dM1fBFf87MaCJpA=)

**Campaigns are expensive to run, especially ones that challenge the status quo.** Because we’re running in a Republican district, we need to work extra hard to win over voters. What’s more, we plan to register between 15,000-20,000 new voters to help put us over the edge in California’s 8th district. That means voter engagement tech, campaign data, and staff on the ground.

But all of those efforts will take major resources. That’s why it’s so important that we raise the money we need ahead of time. [**If you can donate today, we’ll be able to prove to political pundits, press, and endorsing organizations that we have what it takes to go all the way. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36444475/308104848/-1805461028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFkNzAwNS0yMjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYp_TUUWGC6vlhtWD70InH3vZ4n-dM1fBFf87MaCJpA=)

Can I count on you today?

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

name: Anne Maher
subject: My husband needs your support
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
Over the years, I’ve had the wonderful opportunity to meet many of Peter’s friends and supporters, but if I haven’t had the chance to meet you, I’m Anne Maher, Peter Franchot’s wife of 41 years.
As you know, my husband is running for Governor in 2022. Over his decades of service to Maryland, I’ve witnessed firsthand his deep commitment to serving the people. He’s been an ardent champion of our working families and small businesses, and during this challenging time for our state, he fought to make sure that they were getting the help they needed.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie2021?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie2021?amount=20.22]Peter is fired up and ready to win the Democratic nomination for Governor in June 2022. He’s already gotten the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials, and he’s released a detailed platform on his bold vision for the future of our state. In the months ahead, he’ll continue to build a winning coalition of support by visiting communities in every corner of the state to hear what people have to say about the kitchen-table issues.
Peter and his team are working day-in, day-out to build this movement. I couldn’t be more proud of him, and of the dedicated staffers that are putting in the time and effort to bring change to our state. But here’s the thing you need to know: they can’t do it alone. Grassroots supporters like you are crucial if we’re going to build the future that Maryland’s communities deserve. We need Peter as our next Governor, and we need you to help us reach our fundraising goals to make that happen. Every dollar raised will go towards ensuring my husband’s campaign has the resources he needs to win this competitive election.
Would you consider making a contribution to his campaign today? I know that my husband is incredibly grateful for your support, especially during these crucial months in the lead up to 2022.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie2021?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie2021?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie2021?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie2021?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie2021]Thank you for your continued support of my husband. He is honored by the trust and confidence you’ve placed in him, and he will continue to deliver results as your dedicated public servant.
Thank you,
Anne

clean_body: [ Peter, Over the years, I’ve had the wonderful opportunity to meet many of Peter’s friends and supporters, but if I haven’t had the chance to meet you, I’m Anne Maher, Peter Franchot’s wife of 41 years. As you know, my husband is running for Governor in 2022. Over his decades of service to Maryland, I’ve witnessed firsthand his deep commitment to serving the people. He’s been an ardent champion of our working families and small businesses, and during this challenging time for our state, he fought to make sure that they were getting the help they needed. [ is fired up and ready to win the Democratic nomination for Governor in June 2022. He’s already gotten the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials, and he’s released a detailed platform on his bold vision for the future of our state. In the months ahead, he’ll continue to build a winning coalition of support by visiting communities in every corner of the state to hear what people have to say about the kitchen-table issues. Peter and his team are working day-in, day-out to build this movement. I couldn’t be more proud of him, and of the dedicated staffers that are putting in the time and effort to bring change to our state. But here’s the thing you need to know: they can’t do it alone. Grassroots supporters like you are crucial if we’re going to build the future that Maryland’s communities deserve. We need Peter as our next Governor, and we need you to help us reach our fundraising goals to make that happen. Every dollar raised will go towards ensuring my husband’s campaign has the resources he needs to win this competitive election. Would you consider making a contribution to his campaign today? I know that my husband is incredibly grateful for your support, especially during these crucial months in the lead up to 2022. name: Marisa Wood
subject: Air quality.
body:
Smoke is particularly risky for young kids. I watch some of them struggle with asthma and other complications from climate change and our deteriorating environment. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36446228/308109885/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVlMWJiZC0yNTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Iie1Ai4LDBRBHkmHoImVU-ONuXhosRNd-lNFD5fSws=)
Here's an update on our air quality in the Central Valley, friend.

As wildfires rage across our state, you may have seen the health advisories telling folks to stay in doors. The impact of smoke and air pollution on our kids can't be understated, especially with the Delta variant continuing to surge.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36446229/308109886/-686739743?refcode=em-92521-full-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVlMWJiZC0yNTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Iie1Ai4LDBRBHkmHoImVU-ONuXhosRNd-lNFD5fSws=)
_Our skies are looking grim these days (photo credit: Kern Valley Sun)._
I can't help but think of the kids I teach. Smoke is very harmful for them -- especially during recess. I've watched some struggle with asthma and other complications due to climate change and our deteriorating environment.

It's not just from fires. According to the _American Lung Association,_ three of the ten smoggiest cities in the entire country are right here in California’s Central Valley. It breaks my heart, but more than anything it makes me mad. We need policies that address our air quality issues, but time and time again crooked politicians like Kevin McCarthy block these policies and deny they exist.

**I believe in science.** I believe in reducing carbon emissions. We deserve better than McCarthy who would rather defend the furthest-right wing members of his party like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene than work on this issue.

That's a big part of why I'm running to replace Kevin McCarthy and why I'm asking:

**[If you are ready to be part of the solution, will you chip in $3 toward my end-of-quarter deadline today? The future for all of our kids and grandchildren is on the line, and we can't waste time with someone like Kevin McCarthy who refuses to give these issues the attention they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36446230/308109887/-686739743?refcode=em-92521-full-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVlMWJiZC0yNTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Iie1Ai4LDBRBHkmHoImVU-ONuXhosRNd-lNFD5fSws=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36446231/308109888/-686739743?refcode=em-92521-full-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVlMWJiZC0yNTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Iie1Ai4LDBRBHkmHoImVU-ONuXhosRNd-lNFD5fSws=)

clean_body: Smoke is particularly risky for young kids. I watch some of them struggle with asthma and other complications from climate change and our deteriorating environment. | = Here's an update on our air quality in the Central Valley, friend. As wildfires rage across our state, you may have seen the health advisories telling folks to stay in doors. The impact of smoke and air pollution on our kids can't be understated, especially with the Delta variant continuing to surge. = Our skies are looking grim these days (photo credit: Kern Valley Sun). I can't help but think of the kids I teach. Smoke is very harmful for them -- especially during recess. I've watched some struggle with asthma and other complications due to climate change and our deteriorating environment. It's not just from fires. According to the American Lung Association, three of the ten smoggiest cities in the entire country are right here in California’s Central Valley. It breaks my heart, but more than anything it makes me mad. We need policies that address our air quality issues, but time and time again crooked politicians like Kevin McCarthy block these policies and deny they exist. I believe in science. I believe in reducing carbon emissions. We deserve better than McCarthy who would rather defend the furthest-right wing members of his party like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene than work on this issue. That's a big part of why I'm running to replace Kevin McCarthy and why I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Marisa Wood Teacher for Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. **PRESIDENT TRUMP IS HOLDING A RALLY ON SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 25TH, AND I'M PERSONALLY INVITING YOU TO BE A PART OF THE WELCOME COMMITTEE. WHETHER YOU LIVE IN GEORGIA OR NOT, IT'S IMPORTANT PRESIDENT TRUMP KNOWS YOU SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS TO FLIP GEORGIA'S SENATE SEAT RED AND STOP THE RADICAL DEMOCRAT AGENDA. President Trump hasn't held a rally in Georgia since January, and the feeling here on the ground is one of excitement. I'm going to be in the crowd cheering the president as he takes the podium. I hope that if you're in Georgia **you will make an effort to be there as well!**

Democrats, Republicans and Independents know control of the Senate runs through Georgia, which is why President Trump is making appearances in our state a priority. Last year, Democrat special interest groups spent more than $100 million dollars to squeak out the narrowest of wins for their candidates; **it's imperative we deny them another victory next year.**

Flipping the Senate seat temporarily occupied by Raphael Warnock is critical if we're going to restore a Republican majority in Washington. Democrats are running amuck and leading our nation into bankruptcy. **[We need to know if you agree and if you're going to stand with President Trump and me as we work to ensure a Republican victory in Georgia next fall.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=bc64a5f046b24386aca9bd72e64580c5&_e=V_BjsywjAmWQ936PlhhBwlSIxG7aMu7hOSqxal6J5VeoMG2RuUByvq9gjFV8gbzzFh7xKx-_UD1gd65AzYJJX2ZF0f3OlLAdvuj2RRJl6WW9NWr5emvtdvi51SOuY2qvZ3WffCvy1R-ZHQxfyCUTJbwKVxPLulbi1VCVl7HciGupm4A6vy_lYzths0DCKqvyH3vpSrELM3d6mvo_Umn2t6L2hw-rdYODBlNAN3SRmEtP3TMFAXOKpJsLfAeY53QEgeoicOHrj8RnXbm6vWSJza3tSl24MD3VVXa9ThpivenpCnWUI9hMzJwjeIiORQdA4a89edvQ-Ga14v0SQ5ojOgS88h-Ztr_rArq_KpsfZFC9imnajwnQ57lE4iCM4wljxsTWqSS3y77ChnvjLl01Qb5QMHSArH-IFCMRWNmSs1_p-cocDMNq-sH5chGqa-XLZceAWRK1YRakYfB2um3-NqHTwivTGMD4ckPMreGNZeGwLzhwbLc7IqJ4I41oLfQq9Ap2Ru8jbTprUkAwSg0Iz_j20YVvtRVRNKnVzKrNr0C9U9m4QAZNdo5zvJ5TkKrQ)**

When I speak to President Trump this Saturday during his rally, I want to be able to report to him just how many folks across Georgia and the country we've been able to sign up in support of making Georgia Republican once again. Can I let him know you're on board?

**[Please take a moment right now to let me and President Trump know that you're supportive of our efforts to defeat Raphael Warnock in next year's election and elect Republicans up and down the board.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=bc64a5f046b24386aca9bd72e64580c5&_e=V_BjsywjAmWQ936PlhhBwlSIxG7aMu7hOSqxal6J5VeoMG2RuUByvq9gjFV8gbzzFh7xKx-_UD1gd65AzYJJX2ZF0f3OlLAdvuj2RRJl6WW9NWr5emvtdvi51SOuY2qvZ3WffCvy1R-ZHQxfyCUTJbwKVxPLulbi1VCVl7HciGupm4A6vy_lYzths0DCKqvyH3vpSrELM3d6mvo_Umn2t6L2hw-rdYODBlNAN3SRmEtP3TMFAXOKpJsLfAeY53QEgeoicOHrj8RnXbm6vWSJza3tSl24MD3VVXa9ThpivenpCnWUI9hMzJwjeIiORQdA4a89edvQ-Ga14v0SQ5ojOgS88h-Ztr_rArq_KpsfZFBlIxvl1h6z5dV-QetgN8VXLP4v8VHczMSBjup0QGJYUIS_WOH3piR8clJoFIlD3vOxCEZehha8UzymK3b_5KCKlFLG65BNuSAZkOQca-R3F8kUcylHXpQu3JIBbHFRSKxl0BoQV1D4f5kCGzSyn3wLlPQbqkgNhxvqjANF9OLfocsAWfJ-d8esugev_A9WeHzCRo0tDse57ufRpyIXGFKI)**

Friend,
All across the nation, crime is on the rise. At the same time, Liberals are defunding our police. **This is an outrage!**
Everyone should feel safe at home, in your neighborhood, and anywhere you go. Law enforcement is there to protect and serve, but when we remove them from the community, they can do neither. This gives criminals free reign to run rampant.

| | I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my wife, Lauren.

There’s nothing more important to me than my family.

[**_Which is exactly why I’m running for Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447471/308113914/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=)

My father died from COVID-19 — while Don Bacon voted against pandemic relief.

My daughter was born prematurely and spent her first days in the NICU — while Don Bacon voted against the Affordable Care Act.

I fought for affordable housing for everyday families — while Don Bacon voted to slash taxes for DC billionaires.

[**_I’m running because our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But Don Bacon has shown us time and time again that he’s not on our side. To win this race, I need to reach my $10,381 goal so I can keep my campaign running. I’m humbly asking: will you chip in $10 to help me get there?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447473/308113917/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447475/308113919/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Tony

P.S. I’m forwarding you Lauren’s message, in case you missed it. I hope you can see why this is so important to us.

* * *

[**_I know it’s the weekend. But I promised my husband, Tony, that I’d lend him a hand today. I’m about to explain why flipping this seat is so important and why I’m confident Tony can pull this off. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 now to support him? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447484/308113929/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=)

Since he launched his campaign for Congress, Tony has been working day and night.

— Knocking on doors to meet voters
— Connecting with local businesses and community organizations
— Raising money to keep his campaign running
— _On top of helping me raise our two young kids!_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447486/308113930/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=)
That's just how Tony is.

[**_When Tony believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done. And right now, I know in my heart that our neighbors need a fighter like Tony in Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447487/308113932/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=)

Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service.

I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families.

Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school.

Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can.

That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman.

Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations.

After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, [**_I knew that Tony was the right person to replace him._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447489/308113933/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=)

[**_Tony has shown us he is the leader that our community and our families need and deserve. But Don Bacon already has over $420,000 lined up to stop Tony from winning. I know if anyone can catch up and flip this seat, it’s Tony -- but only if he can hit his $10,381 goal before his End-of-Week Deadline. I’m personally asking: will you chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447492/308113934/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=)

I know you work hard for your money and I wish I didn’t have to ask.

But if Tony misses his $10,381 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign that will hurt his chances of winning.
[**So I’m asking one last time: If you believe in Tony as much as I do, will you chip in $10 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36447493/308113937/1129282168?refcode=20210925_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE5NjE2Ny0yYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a54_uxZ2RrK3hb1nTYuz4M0xXGdufd7o8KiXxAGDz-Y=)

clean_body: There’s nothing more important to me than... | | | I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my wife, Lauren. There’s nothing more important to me than my family. = My father died from COVID-19 — while Don Bacon voted against pandemic relief. My daughter was born prematurely and spent her first days in the NICU — while Don Bacon voted against the Affordable Care Act. I fought for affordable housing for everyday families — while Don Bacon voted to slash taxes for DC billionaires. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Tony P.S. I’m forwarding you Lauren’s message, in case you missed it. I hope you can see why this is so important to us. = Since he launched his campaign for Congress, Tony has been working day and night. — Knocking on doors to meet voters — Connecting with local businesses and community organizations — Raising money to keep his campaign running — On top of helping me raise our two young kids! = That's just how Tony is. = Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service. I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families. Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school. Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can. That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman. Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations. After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, = = I know you work hard for your money and I wish I didn’t have to ask. But if Tony misses his $10,381 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign that will hurt his chances of winning. = | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for supporting my husband, Lauren (and Ava and Luca!) | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! Tony Vargas for Congress PO Box 746 Boys Town, NE 68010 United States info@vargasfornebraska.com | | Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress

name: Adam Schiff
subject: how we prevent a nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/axZEYONH0xdhuTo5XzwCxkt8mOolazLy7aEmZA3FIjM=/zPNJO8sq6ZPs9o87i0jQULwkpBHYp8SYP4BsK5wIZ9U=?refcode=E11494-20210925-AdamSchiff-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Hey Peter, It's Adam Schiff. In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to [**make a donation to help Josh Harder**](https://act.myngp.com/el/axZEYONH0xdhuTo5XzwCxkt8mOolazLy7aEmZA3FIjM=/zPNJO8sq6ZPs9o87i0jQULwkpBHYp8SYP4BsK5wIZ9U=?refcode=E11494-20210925-AdamSchiff-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) before his major end of the month deadline. But first, I want to explain what's at stake. Time after time, Republicans in the House have prioritized politics over people. Their party over our democracy. And it's putting our democracy at risk. They have pushed voter suppression bills. They have tried to block our progress at every turn. And they are doing everything they can to take back the House in 2022. That's why they are targeting Josh Harder's seat, and trying to beat him any way they can with major corporate dollars, shadowy Super PACs and anything they can throw at him -- and it's working!
