[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=6d91127291fd47d281ce666dfd565c43&_e=cd-xge5mEt5yERBE1Q4aCUPfUZ1758CSR-ClDEvj6xXp4k1aYRs76aICLX_IG3wVuO80h_3fcHaN4geRH-42xAiBGd76UYZMp9w2Y_yI9qAjYtlCPktju1Y1T1b4k5n2dBlhsNjYhkABZC_578Omx-bGgpAkJhCpbXpeL375EpwFxayARx5y7ApD4ci6IKK4jhiVSdap1lWxSq4KPqcfD9TRdBkqNwUGiRXAxoSJG0yWv_WvizEsDtXOc6e0u08crxPfroDYnRtQpB2E6sm7Vc3IYxyu-5T_-3QWBPqYm9iGSdRcQESuov-ScHIL8vHw8B9EmxEpLlrnj72yyYfXiWXc0J0ZMeiRUffycXWO4KH5dOpNw1hQ-e8aomoQMVvIOuSenV-XrLMNAdPoYNbapty_QnHSh5GpyTUFibZCEOh7eP5AuDzTMo62aFXRsTNsK8IxngGAR0CWMqmik8R9R4_ep7MBY7zx_sSoZ4lyvck%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=6d91127291fd47d281ce666dfd565c43&_e=cd-xge5mEt5yERBE1Q4aCUPfUZ1758CSR-ClDEvj6xXp4k1aYRs76aICLX_IG3wVuO80h_3fcHaN4geRH-42xO-zGzfmFTLkY42jhTb_QCQ0FyusX05Kyp57zW9dOKBBzT3Mxssysoii44-is0g00pcbnNg4rNAN8X6VLzItLOjTG9WIeGUoOafeUKuLZlscxh7dSKemPKZvlPsVD2W-vcMrLNhDqeHtdWQZHklt052UhAgb-BswH3aOOQ6_qtvhph70qUVOE5Nl1OIieggcJatP9U5gN0dfE3I92X4XzGgVt8S6BTNY4xkTdNHAdu4jPhSFJ7zy8uWxip8m2m4B-qYmd5SJ0bP2c3L-31V8b8v0JJPnnlkCK9LroSHxnYVSjNSo5f7RrjvOdXRk7KZqq9eQH61r6TX9CQCnhhYmB_XyWA7MTFEffSpDKPxHoXQmlVvFhiLHxPOaonCzz2FMwA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated. It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges? Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given us the guide: The Federalist Papers. These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described **[The Federalist Papers](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=6d91127291fd47d281ce666dfd565c43&_e=cd-xge5mEt5yERBE1Q4aCUPfUZ1758CSR-ClDEvj6xXp4k1aYRs76aICLX_IG3wVuO80h_3fcHaN4geRH-42xO-zGzfmFTLkY42jhTb_QCQ0FyusX05Kyp57zW9dOKBBzT3Mxssysoii44-is0g00pcbnNg4rNAN8X6VLzItLOjTG9WIeGUoOafeUKuLZlscxh7dSKemPKZvlPsVD2W-vcMrLNhDqeHtdWQZHklt052UhAgb-BswH3aOOQ6_qtvhoPmWSKTvUiZM83h-R5Ifvh3qDlDAwZFTz1rxw1GTUnLvEpANOaL9qdPRC3qo0yaxZ2S3fnOYONuLggcMHPqAIbi3_IDtIqzUGIKP2rPU69i0I4zSC6Nl_gaQqUoMYruoWUZmsSjSIvhKhKhg6afjbniFtJL6Q9PdG2-4H3ls710bS2W5qvWH_h_OQ9eXryAZmrrrRdx7DakRDU_Zm-5lCw%3D%3D)** as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to give you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale’s free online course,**[“The Federalist Papers,”](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=6d91127291fd47d281ce666dfd565c43&_e=cd-xge5mEt5yERBE1Q4aCUPfUZ1758CSR-ClDEvj6xXp4k1aYRs76aICLX_IG3wVuO80h_3fcHaN4geRH-42xO-zGzfmFTLkY42jhTb_QCQ0FyusX05Kyp57zW9dOKBBzT3Mxssysoii44-is0g00pcbnNg4rNAN8X6VLzItLOjTG9WIeGUoOafeUKuLZlscxh7dSKemPKZvlPsVD2W-vcMrLNhDqeHtdWQZHklt052UhAgb-BswH3aOOQ6_qtvhxaE7O7Cu6a6yfgy6X2IiCm3CSAov7WMz7R7zc36iZhV-Olf0JeUoqvKpF7TwnETA3Ay5mgAfgtBHiec0L9pY7_PROatFH2N5bzEd0i7v_293YdaU9jTVHQd4PwlGqbVlSm5WlwjEuNE0n2QUKkLvOVMf1Gcj3mvNuJVIuuXELdf3iyTd4ilTJlNfjjUKWOCA1AdCHt9qhPhlqdhKO2PdxQ%3D%3D)** today. Taught by Hillsdale College’s politics faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the nature of the three branches of government, and the argument concerning the Bill of Rights. Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll activate your free enrollment in **[“The Federalist Papers”](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=6d91127291fd47d281ce666dfd565c43&_e=cd-xge5mEt5yERBE1Q4aCUPfUZ1758CSR-ClDEvj6xXp4k1aYRs76aICLX_IG3wVuO80h_3fcHaN4geRH-42xO-zGzfmFTLkY42jhTb_QCQ0FyusX05Kyp57zW9dOKBBzT3Mxssysoii44-is0g00pcbnNg4rNAN8X6VLzItLOjTG9WIeGUoOafeUKuLZlscxh7dSKemPKZvlPsVD2W-vcMrLNhDqeHtdWQZHklt052UhAgb-BswH3aOOQ6_qtvhjEKgNNPYYp6KoQYHGHWQJkPhYV0f-ubRUY9F2l5LWJxlj_B8z2hVthkMyO9KuIsE1nfxxIwZqIT7MO98Nm5KxZs4ciRKYxdI6p1pAGtODi-UQCDQc0mFBC5Ct1qWF3w2F-nrhImRYWAH6BszRf3PlhijMuIwiAEHACsULKU2N0XGmdebzb6bUNNyXGiS2ROd6fBNguevjFGRromAqKeI9g%3D%3D)** today. [Activate your free course now »](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=6d91127291fd47d281ce666dfd565c43&_e=cd-xge5mEt5yERBE1Q4aCUPfUZ1758CSR-ClDEvj6xXp4k1aYRs76aICLX_IG3wVuO80h_3fcHaN4geRH-42xO-zGzfmFTLkY42jhTb_QCQ0FyusX05Kyp57zW9dOKBBzT3Mxssysoii44-is0g00pcbnNg4rNAN8X6VLzItLOjTG9WIeGUoOafeUKuLZlscxh7dSKemPKZvlPsVD2W-vcMrLNhDqeHtdWQZHklt052UhAgb-BswH3aOOQ6_qtvhnX6jpriCbPwihAzgmGLb6rBRPpPcXrImVTBt-pZuwb0f-GepzrZQr3oAseJ9TFbiqAIHTTwlO6UcLR_9h4MZKAPfIfPzhnx4olZ7rB_e00uzjHIhyLQn_tZo2rIwvky7ktd-CjYncyy1LroeByCTAGyU4Ary7mabqiureggL2y4DMuQvRpFZdlRhVXM_-Yyau4B1kZtXL0Sragr2uDewdA%3D%3D)
Warm regards,

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Noticed something weird in our stats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This says a lot about the current status of the campaign. Take a look if you can today:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210925-2762-header&t=1&akid=2762%2E434096%2E5xa_RL)
Hey, Peter — so we're almost at our end-of-quarter FEC deadline.
Remember, that's when we’re legally required to report out all our latest fundraising numbers to the feds. The press (and our GOP opponents) are going to scour these numbers and gauge our momentum.
A lot of donations? _That means John Fetterman has the momentum to win._
Too few donations? _That makes our team look beatable._
Because this is high stakes stuff, we generally try to make a really big push right before the closing deadline.
**Peter, the truth is, we're still behind on our goal for the quarter. And if we don't see a quick surge of support, we could miss it.** We were trying to find out why, and then we noticed this... our average donation has gone down since our campaign first began:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30305?refcode=em20210925-2762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2762%2E434096%2E5xa_RL)
We started up there in the $31 range. Now we're down somewhere around $22.
In a weird way, we're proud of it! Here's why:
A low average donation is the hallmark of a real people-powered campaign. It shows that we're not funded solely by a bunch of rich elites with deep pockets.
But, on the other hand, it means the money we used to raise from two donations — well, now we need three to raise the same amount!
**We can't afford to miss our goal because of the aforementioned high stakes — reporters, media narratives, yada yada.** So, we're asking everyone who hasn't donated to make their very first contribution to John Fetterman today — that'll help us close the gap.
[**_Can you make your first $5 donation right now to help John Fetterman reach our FEC end-of-quarter goal? Every donation helps us show the strength and size of this grassroots campaign to flip PA blue._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30305?refcode=em20210925-2762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2762%2E434096%2E5xa_RL)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30305?refcode=em20210925-2762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2762%2E434096%2E5xa_RL)**
Look, if you can give ANY amount at all today, that makes you a hero in our books. Seriously, it means a lot to us.
If you can't give today, we understand, and that's OK too.
**At the end of the day, we're proud that we're the only campaign in this race with way more than 300,000+ grassroots contributions.** It says a lot about the kind of inclusive, grassroots movement we’re building. And it means a lot when it comes to flipping a swing state like Pennsylvania.
Thank you for all you do.
— Team Fetterman
P.S. Even if you can't donate $31 or $22 or anywhere near our average donation, your contribution of even a modest amount *really* helps add up on our FEC report. And if you're the kind of person who can afford to do more, that helps a lot too. [** _So, please, consider making a donation now before our deadline hits._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30305?refcode=em20210925-2762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2762%2E434096%2E5xa_RL)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210925-2762-footer&t=24&refcode2=2762_434096_5xa_RL&akid=2762%2E434096%2E5xa_RL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=2762%2E434096%2E5xa_RL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2762%2E434096%2E5xa_RL)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Fellow Conservative,

**I’m in an all-out dash to raise as much cash as possible ahead of next Thursday’s end of quarter fundraising deadline.**

I’m stressed for a number of reasons:
1. I’m actively trying to discourage other Republicans from hopping in the race; no one wants a contentious primary
2. I have to make my fundraising numbers public – meaning everything we brought in as a campaign between July 1st and September 30th. My Democrat opponent is going to use this to gauge how much of a threat I really am to her.

**So, we’re hitting on all cylinders and that means placing ads on Facebook in an attempt to introduce myself to a wider audience**.

I wrote a personal check for $6,000 to pay for them up front;** with a newborn I don’t have the cash to spare, but this seat is a MUST WIN if we’re going to flip the House Republican – so it’s worth it**.

**[Will you take 45 seconds to watch my ad here? If you support my message, would you chip in a few dollars, so I double the amount of time I’m able to keep it running online?](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=6d1e519d26204814b8b31189c15d0782&_e=HGgtNxgSz43uHw-xlZTCLKPIzMM55Zx9_fyeMrU2nst11sDU_O5a_NiwJX9vVZO6YXFrNs4kdGpV-lkrMZhLDSHaQq-Ps6xxqfAPUz9-MUDdB3-wJVNTouqHBXUl3qVgAukX0zV9grMgThxFf9VOLVFaWDlGORsi-jNvRFJ7q_dU2P6qZjrIYuECntQIGMTP5Yum6INX9VLZ1Te42NyxHNeXJGQ1YlrUEOm4aeHiBiVNm_2qGi_-7iZRzix9Mp-fLVyojwq8IDeQ9fiaSgnfAXAgR5-Y__r5qs2ZYCjQjiKcDjNoibH7mjGufe-vsG0sDCd31AHiMHsQgiH6N42H4Ji5jkL0PcwK_B9Qgxm15botKWydcC2JaKPZR_fERhiMlJQ-bWAsKV16UGBvpjcHvr-luk4qSOQWi0z2uCebTpR7rFK4d13ev2sRVzA4mpk9YRVpj9ptWDe-21fQDMg5656xkHnlC1l5q5M0rQwfsco%3D)**

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=6d1e519d26204814b8b31189c15d0782&_e=HGgtNxgSz43uHw-xlZTCLKPIzMM55Zx9_fyeMrU2nst11sDU_O5a_NiwJX9vVZO6YXFrNs4kdGpV-lkrMZhLDSHaQq-Ps6xxqfAPUz9-MUDdB3-wJVNTouqHBXUl3qVgAukX0zV9grMgThxFf9VOLVFaWDlGORsi-jNvRFJ7q_dU2P6qZjrIYuECntQIGMTP5Yum6INX9VLZ1Te42NyxHNeXJGQ1YlrUEOm4aeHiBiVNm_2qGi_-7iZRzix9Mp-fsgkkDJsEsvu7THUPTo_tg0AVkQeb2JFOn_W_DjTcy9fub_JgJt0h3nOUFU7mEVDyHUT-JkYdlkFpSsQNx5mLbg0i5Uh2cS7PskbNghmt1VbMfMsW3XPbvmw0kbBP-B1h55xeb2ucUTMf1FnLBebxsdvtBsgmbrrFp2KUMhqo3gQAS4CMO0xuErZc_Ldx0uii6K5m5ZtY67dfx5FmFbW3AMn6iG3VYJR5oIrjkQcVWis%3D)

I’m stressed for a number of reasons: 1. I’m actively trying to discourage other Republicans from hopping in the race; no one wants a contentious primary 2. I have to make my fundraising numbers public – meaning everything we brought in as a campaign between July 1st and September 30th. My Democrat opponent is going to use this to gauge how much of a threat I really am to her. So, we’re hitting on all cylinders and that means placing ads on Facebook in an attempt to introduce myself to a wider audience. | | Peter,

Yadira and I are not your typical politicians. In fact, we’re both scientists — I’m an environmental geologist and she’s a pediatrician.

As her colleague — and friend — in the Colorado House of Representatives I’ve had the opportunity to see firsthand just how dedicated Yadira is to creating and protecting vibrant, healthy, and inclusive communities in our state.

She’s stood up to big pharmaceutical companies, big tobacco, and big oil and big gas, just to name a few.

As a doctor, Yadira understands science and critical thinking, which is exactly what we need in Congress right now.

She will bring real results like comprehensive health care access, protections for voting rights, and immigration reform to families and workers across Colorado.

clean_body: She is a true advocate for Colorado families. | | Peter, Yadira and I are not your typical politicians. In fact, we’re both scientists — I’m an environmental geologist and she’s a pediatrician. As her colleague — and friend — in the Colorado House of Representatives I’ve had the opportunity to see firsthand just how dedicated Yadira is to creating and protecting vibrant, healthy, and inclusive communities in our state. She’s stood up to big pharmaceutical companies, big tobacco, and big oil and big gas, just to name a few. As a doctor, Yadira understands science and critical thinking, which is exactly what we need in Congress right now. She will bring real results like comprehensive health care access, protections for voting rights, and immigration reform to families and workers across Colorado. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thanks for your support! In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: It’s been a really busy week for Pramila
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, it's been a really busy week for Pramila.
**FIRST:** Pramila made several media appearances to advocate for the passage of the President’s entire Build Back Better agenda. She is refusing to let our urgent and popular priorities — from climate action to economic relief — be left behind. She made a deal to pass the whole thing, and she’s sticking to it.
**THEN:** Pramila took that message to the White House on Wednesday night with other progressives — including Senator Bernie Sanders — where they made the case directly to President Biden for long-overdue investments in climate action, paid leave, universal child care, pre-K, housing, health care, infrastructure, and more that Americans are counting on all of us to deliver.
**NOW:** Corporate America and Big Pharma are in overdrive ahead of a key vote on Monday, spending BIG to sink everything Pramila is working so hard for.
On top of all of that, we have an important end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up in less than a week. [**If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to contribute to our campaign,****_this is it_****— can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to fuel Pramila’s work to secure economic relief, health care, child care, and climate action in the Build Back Better Act?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6652?refcode=em20210925-665&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=665%2E420207%2EKl7Hiu)

Thanks for your support at this critical time,
Team Jayapal

If so, let us know immediately! **](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=5b5eba7ea53a4575882e37dd46640b47&_e=xIcZCa97ZCaQN4BjxvfzzKeRomDc3rrr3NvlF4FgsTLV-vV2w0q5JMurZmGLiZiZg1hQVZbEPp5jCP0fQflltPWtd4SN3DvCskcxAVKoFQR5P0SgvIQdTQIHLar_LY1KAc40TfN5_vuLxk86N_-KRjM6N2V5GOjMxYj_hgne2gwgpRQ7Opd5Qq-uZXiL0sMW3DVK7QatEYyXu3_icEM8qs7emSq67GiUjpBzjcjZgj88WtqiUJTM2njcxbElZqVNV_LKu5l4bT7gG2Iw3o5IzVpZC-q9QpSQbULoW2-uT_2N0RhNkeh2Sk48EQitaD4dFizPPDNLW8tfqj6E7DZb9X7RRmRd5Nlao66xFDGkuQAt_bAqsjKC9kS6DZuk8IGWhoNA1ns3JmILK9Eq3jx09HH6tJF105sulj6C6u-sr09cl0ma3PeiSSK_D7vfp-A75VM878cHlz0h2vqwfK44kYj4Kn6rYo1Z0e7OU978ATLUvX2x7Xy447vMjW9MrO5pSyN60zJHwkkeac879DVUVg%3D%3D) Check out a few of this past week’s endorsers and what they have to say about Derek: \--- _"Derek Schmidt is thoughtful, reasonable, deliberative, and always makes the right decision for Kansas. He has my full support, and I would encourage all Kansans to join me in helping make sure Derek is sworn in as governor in 2023 to get our state back on track."_ **_– Jeff Longbine, Kansas State Senator_** _“Derek Schmidt is a solid defender of our core Kansas conservative values like protecting life, our right to keep and bear arms, and religious freedom. Derek has defended our freedoms by opposing the federal vaccine mandate. Derek has worked to safeguard our communities. He joined with Legislative leaders to demand that Laura Kelly send Kansas resources to help secure our nation's border because of the Biden Administration’s refusal to do so. Derek will make a great governor. He has my full support.”_ **_–Jesse Burris, Kansas State Representative_** Take a look at the rest of our new endorsements from this week:
* Rep. Patrick Penn
* Rep. Marty Long
* Rep. Emil Bergquist
* Rep. Les Mason
* Rep. Avery Anderson

clean_body: Crisis not averted | Friend, The crisis at our Southern Border is beyond dangerous. Is it not Vice President Kamala Harris’s main job to keep our country safe from this? Oh wait, it is. The consistent failure from the Biden Administration is sickening, and there must be consequences. The crisis at the Southern Border puts EVERY American at risk regardless of whether they’re in a border state or not. Illegal immigrants are FLOODING in, and the influx of deadly drugs seems to be never ending. As we approach the End-of-Quarter, we have to mobilize as much support as possible, so we can hold these leaders accountable. | I’m counting on you. New York is counting on you. God Bless, Nicole Malliotakis Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

clean_body: | | | | | Team, Steve’s opponents are making some serious moves here in Nevada. ONE Conspiracy theorist and ex-pro boxer, Joey Gilbert, just opened up his campaign office. TWO Trump lackey and extreme anti-choice candidate Dean Heller just announced his far-right campaign for Governor. THREE Joe Lombardo is already running attack ads in his primary race. We need to respond to all of these in the best way we know how: showing the strength of our people-powered campaign. | | | | | | | | | | | | | To be clear, these aren’t just run of the mill campaign updates. What this means is thatSteve’s Republican opponents are ramping up to make this race super competitive. Because of how close Steve’s last election was, we have to mobilize early on and respond to take these new developments seriously. Plus, don’t forget, Steve already has five opponents who have announced they’re running against him! That number could grow as we get closer to Election Day, folks. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for always making sure this campaign has the resources it needs. clean_body: They’re destroying America, Peter. | Not interested? . We know we’ve been emailing you a lot, Peter. But this is important. They’re setting the agenda in the House of Representatives, and driving our nation towards full-blown socialism. We can’t let them win! Republican leaders like Senator Josh Hawley are standing up and fighting back, but it’s not enough, Peter. We need you to get involved right away! If you don’t, it could be too late... | Stop The Socialist “Squad” EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #0119683 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | The Squad is not content to stay in the House, Peter. They have their sights set on a U.S. Senate seat, as well --- and they’ve made the Battleground State of Missouri a TOP TARGET. If they are permitted to grow their ranks, there’ll be nothing stopping them from taking full control and steering our nation into a socialist disaster. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Republican Digital Team Sent via The Missouri Republican Party

name: Erica Smith for North Carolina
subject: An ambitious goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re coming up against a major deadline in less than a week.
#
We’ll get straight to the point. [**_We’re quickly approaching the FEC fundraising deadline on September 30._****We wanted to take a moment to explain why now is the most important time to make****your first****contribution to our campaign.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17198?t=2&akid=486%2E3698%2EyvnSYH)
Just take a look at who Erica’s running against in this U.S. Senate race...
* * *
| **Mark Walker** @RepMarkWalker
---|---
| | | Who is funding the travel of 15,000 Haitians by land and sea to the RGV? The Biden Administration’s crisis at the border is off the rails. Illegals from over 100 countries have been detained. How many have not? We have no idea who or what is coming into our cities and towns.
---
| **Pat McCrory** @PatMcCroryNC
---|---
| | | Paying people more to stay home, means that small businesses can't find any employees and can't thrive as a result.

We've got to get Americans back to work, and save the American Dream!
---
| **Ted Budd** @TedBuddNC
---|---
| | | Critical race theory has no place in our schools. Thank you Lt. Gov. @markrobinsonNC for standing with me in the fight to protect our future generations from the Left's radical attacks on education. #ncsen #ncpol
---
* * *
**Mark Walker** has absolutely NO empathy for Haitian refugees seeking their human and legal right to asylum.
**Pat McCrory** wants families to suffer even more during the pandemic. (_Guess what, Pat: Maybe folks would get “back to work” if they were paid a dignified living wage.)_
**Ted Budd** thinks teaching our children the full history of this nation is a line we can’t cross. Apparently, for Ted Budd, patriotism is about covering up the injustices of the past and lying about the story of our country.
**you can’t make this stuff up.** We don’t need any more leaders like Mark Walker, Pat McCrory, and Ted Budd, who seek to divide us — and we can’t let them get in the way of flipping this U.S. Senate seat and electing Erica.
But here’s the situation: Erica and our finance team took a hard look at our fundraising numbers, and **we need to raise $100,000 online by September 30 to remain competitive in this U.S. Senate race.**
****
[**_Can you make your first $5 donation today to help us close our $8,000 fundraising gap the September 30 FEC deadline? We’re a people-powered campaign and we rely on small-dollar donations._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17198?t=4&akid=486%2E3698%2EyvnSYH)
****
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17323?refcode=em20210925-486&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=486%2E3698%2EyvnSYH)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17198?t=24&akid=486%2E3698%2EyvnSYH)
Together, we will build a grassroots campaign for a different North Carolina — one that loves us back the same way we love it.
Thank you for all you do,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210925-486-footer&t=25&refcode2=486_3698_yvnSYH&akid=486%2E3698%2EyvnSYH)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=486%2E3698%2EyvnSYH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=486%2E3698%2EyvnSYH)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Team Engel
subject: Republicans are raising record amounts of money - help us fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
---
Hello friend,
While most of us see the Arizona "fraudit" and the rising popularity of the increasingly unhinged GOP fringe as signs that the Republican Party has lost their way, their fundraising numbers tell a very different story.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36452160/308129764/41694283?refcode=X_092421_EOQ_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGRkYzIyYS0zYjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Cy6m9dvS7Vos714rcqEGKhDu4Q2x3VlN73AgG2g2iM=)
---

**Republicans are breaking fundraising records by perpetuating "The Big Lie" and they're coming after this seat. **

The Democratic majority is very much on the line next year, and Republicans have identified AZ-02 as their top target.

That's the bad news.

The good news is that we have Kirsten Engel. She's a fighter who has never lost an election and shares the same Southern Arizona values that helped elect leaders like Gabby Giffords and Ann Kirkpatrick. Kirsten is who we need protecting this seat.

But after seeing the last 6 months of chaos from the Left’s radical agenda, President Trump REFUSES to be complacent with just any old Republican Senate majority... Which is why I firmly stand behind my decision that I will NOT vote for Mitch McConnell as leader in the Senate. The establishment and the RINOs have already begun attacking me -- but I wear their attacks as a badge of honor. The only support I need is from grassroots patriots like YOU. When General Flynn endorsed our campaign, he hit the nail right on the head: “Worse than the radical leftists, the corrupt Deep State, the mainstream media, and Big Tech are the feckless and spineless Republicans who have utterly surrendered.” \- Michael Flynn This is our moment to rebuild the GOP and NEVER again allow it to surrender our America First values and principles to the radical Left. A Republican Senate majority built by the establishment simply won’t do. We need a pro-Trump majority that will always fight for YOU, the Silent Majority. clean_body: Just hours left to hit our goal... | Friend, We all remember the riots and lawlessness that swept the country last year. But here in Wisconsin, we had it twice as bad... Our radical liberal governor, Tony Evers, stoked the flames of division, criticized the very police who were trying to protect us, and allowed the city of Kenosha to BURN. That’s why our campaign’s FIRST ad is so important -- we need to remind EVERY voter exactly who Tony Evers really is. But with the ad-buy deadline TONIGHT at 9:45 P.M., I’m counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help raise the remaining $23,575 we need to run this ad. Friend, I decided to run for governor because I couldn’t sit on the sidelines any longer... The hardworking people of Wisconsin deserve good jobs, our kids deserve to be allowed into the classroom, and our families deserve to live in safe neighborhoods. But Tony Evers doesn’t care what the PEOPLE deserve, he only cares about one man -- himself. I saw the state that I love being failed time and again by a left-wing governor more determined to please special interests and liberal unions than protect his own citizens. Enough is enough. We must FIRE Tony Evers. But first, I need your help reaching our goal for our Ad Fund so that every voter hears our conservative message and the TRUTH about Tony Evers. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I tested positive for COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=968%2E3611125%2EF6pMX7 ][IMG]

Hello,

I never imagined I would have to send this email, but as you might know, I
recently tested positive for a breakthrough case of COVID-19.

I’m in good health, and at home following CDC guidelines. But I have to be
honest about something: this pandemic has affected everything from schools
to businesses and yes, even our campaign.

We’ve had to cancel all of our in-person fundraisers for the rest of the
month. It was the right thing to do, and I’m proud of my team’s decision.
But this means our FEC fundraising goal is taking a huge hit right before
our numbers go public.

To make matters worse, a new poll was just released that shows me
neck-and-neck with my GOP opponents. In other words, we really can’t
afford to post a weak FEC report.

My team is working overtime right now to rework our strategy and ensure we
have the resources necessary to lay the groundwork for victory. And
messages like this are more critical than ever to help us reach our FEC
goal.

The truth is, we won’t reach our deadline in 5 days unless folks like you
step up and chip in to this email. So I’m personally asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4376?t=1007&akid=968%2E3611125%2EF6pMX7 ]Will you donate $25 or more right now? Your contribution before our FEC
deadline will ensure we have the resources we need to fight off the GOP’s
attacks, break the stalemate in the polls, and flip Ohio’s Senate seat
blue.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4376?t=1008&akid=968%2E3611125%2EF6pMX7 ]Donate

Thank you for your support today. And I’m grateful to have the protection
of a safe and effective vaccine that's kept my case fairly mild.

Stay safe everyone,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=968%2E3611125%2EF6pMX7 ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=968%2E3611125%2EF6pMX7 ]click here.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Students are returning to left-wing campuses
body:
Students across the nation — young Americans who love our nation, our flag, and our freedoms — are heading back “behind en
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztv6qh2stvvb0unhqbnjgd27dmsjcakbqqkrg5gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdg6cor2c5h2bs) | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z01l092f25blqi1380ehreec1gc22p3r834obj7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdg6cor2c5h2bs) Fellow American, Students across the nation — young Americans who love our nation, our flag, and our freedoms — are heading back “behind enemy lines” to college campuses dominated by the radical Left. These vicious campus Leftists will do all they can to indoctrinate the next generation with toxic lies; push dangerous, anti-America, socialist ideologies; and try to censor or “cancel” any Conservative students who dare to speak up against them. [**America-loving young people need to hear from Real Americans like you! Will you sign this note of support to students returning to liberal campuses?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhn0nemdd4q6887fdbrosro2o9bnifa66sfav3pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdg6cor2c5h2bs) Conservative students must know that the leftist professors and administrators they hear every day on campus do not represent the views of most Americans and that the majority of Americans are rooting for them. That’s why, this fall, Turning Point USA will activate and train EVEN MORE young Conservative activists this year ... will share our winning, pro-America message on EVEN MORE campuses ... and will build an army of EVEN MORE than 400,000 student activists who believe in American Greatness and who are ready to fight — and win — the American Culture War against the Left. [**Let these patriotic young Americans — the Turning Point Generation — know that YOU are with them!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1rl37u8iq1kvnld616pat83j7a711bfrkt7jn30_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdg6cor2c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Note of Support**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkq7e4q5vmuc61b5bnq6om0n89s2q4fa7huqnfvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdg6cor2c5h2bs)
You and I must remind these America-loving students not to be intimidated by the viciousness of the radical Left.

We must ensure the next generation isn’t poisoned by lies that would teach them to hate our great nation and all that it stands for.

We must let these students know that while they may be tested for standing true to their Conservative principles, values, and beliefs ... they are not fighting alone and they WILL win in the American Culture War against the campus left.

[**Please add your name RIGHT NOW to this note of support to Turning Point USA students so they return to campus knowing Real Americans support them.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zms1b9o6d03bjga7hbrsupu6udfjm112aroip10g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdg6cor2c5h2bs)
[**Sign The Note of Support**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlpgb6stioqdlsjhfp5u1qqdiqhr61gqdqtbacao_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdg6cor2c5h2bs)
For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

_**“SOLD! For $68,000,000,000,000 to the children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer.”**_
-Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden
Fellow Conservative,

In all my days as an auctioneer, I’ve never seen a bidder more eager to throw money away than this Congress under Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. **But the buck doesn’t even stop at $68 TRILLION, they’ve thrown away our American values and[that’s why I’ve decided to run for the U.S. Senate seat opening in Missouri.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b8587aa29f7847389483775169106f1e&_e=-vGTjao_zA5NMrybzEFROexj8inqGAlGNcg-74r-pDSRj4OzFWKwCj55ckSd1nrQRSI10sF_4CMtXThVYVMJ6sJyDnloKT_R36A0bi1DPY9LZhxIEdmZ45KOD0eWleR0PI2cTS1kIr1-n4G-kJTeMIJJpxDUSBFAAhlBtauoc7GM_MD_QwTaYuj_vNyDPPFrmQXbP8VOh04mFA2IcCIU3c7slGI8z-ehHdAoRBsvcf-1IkAZgSe2Drz4IsgfgmD56exG1ZsEcp-Hbk__UrR3lHe59PszK6bpDWmJZO1Elh-tklcMHps-XFbhbH1mHNwrrXsjkLkxTGWAes9XQqp1nQQU2tLCuuqPTHOMGpS_h-MOZCJzbKP81r9rJxU7K56JEM2JV53n3g7KYrSBcikPfg5IJ9KE59nc0joWHwSJhEDlnMC4Ieoj3WHTguKsXiwo6D4FW6JRsIpyPTGXz-dczw%3D%3D)**

My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American.

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement next year. **We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially!** [**That’s why I need you to help me protect this Missouri senate seat, immediately.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b8587aa29f7847389483775169106f1e&_e=-vGTjao_zA5NMrybzEFROexj8inqGAlGNcg-74r-pDSRj4OzFWKwCj55ckSd1nrQRSI10sF_4CMtXThVYVMJ6sJyDnloKT_R36A0bi1DPY9LZhxIEdmZ45KOD0eWleR0PI2cTS1kIr1-n4G-kJTeMIJJpxDUSBFAAhlBtauoc7GM_MD_QwTaYuj_vNyDPPFrmQXbP8VOh04mFA2IcCIU3c7slGI8z-ehHdAoRBsvcf-1IkAZgSe2Drz4IsgfgmD57UbeLKBTZrsEER42ummHqvsprjMOQ3CliIHffiMKnEolw6o-E6_l93DXRPNSR8Fr0bB7G5e7dakeVlTMCx1nFJf32MEfTL0bFNBBhbge30RMX8e2vlmxIHBgDhs4SUGh8GE7kCo3q1X_z4Qrh6-47TQGQFY6u75sWvN--2GVWJ9UpizN12LULXFbLp9ZxD4vnwc0PbQ64l3jJlqbnkkdeg%3D%3D)

[** BID ON BILLY ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b8587aa29f7847389483775169106f1e&_e=-vGTjao_zA5NMrybzEFROexj8inqGAlGNcg-74r-pDSRj4OzFWKwCj55ckSd1nrQRSI10sF_4CMtXThVYVMJ6sJyDnloKT_R36A0bi1DPY9LZhxIEdmZ45KOD0eWleR0PI2cTS1kIr1-n4G-kJTeMIJJpxDUSBFAAhlBtauoc7GM_MD_QwTaYuj_vNyDPPFrmQXbP8VOh04mFA2IcCIU3c7slGI8z-ehHdAoRBsvcf-1IkAZgSe2Drz4IsgfgmD5dbGBHjMxWCJHRMf-XpqTaOhANiPKhP2MRjQoD7ZlEl_7u7xZFI4q78VMvdHR99pi7oRhOFvEGspcsp74HszFzfZegI8Iaks3a7oQWdJPiBcRHFG0zldgXiNpkQMnzUx1VkDIEg6na0N_RFcNnDbcn9x0zCSZQ-PeAY93dnbmkqBrxlsJObVTtPiYIYmKkBqeXZJwNJfPihutPPVnfXmfJA%3D%3D)
Fellow Conservative, I for one, will not stand for the Left spending trillions of dollars all for my children and following generations to repay with their hard-earned tax dollars. Taxes should provide for the well-being of Americans, not illegal immigrants and Democrat slush funds.

**As long as Joe Biden and his Washington Democrats remain in power, we can bet on Americans being put LAST.**

Under this administration, America has lost its way and I plan to work with a Republican Senate majority to put us back on track in 2022. name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is a very important ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruSog2mCtFEQskeY4DRPutlgZxnEj7pUuHLMmHYyvuMKzbXqSpe4FjPIOTyXPvhxYN1yWV3BJ53kz6KhxWGi0H3NeaLDmrXFYcxrC4VVHrEytMaow1NaBnJGp0XuIe47OmHKXK0xr2V7B0DfYFnr8cQ4RneQ4-HvLq_d033Cmh1WFWJ1sIr2M03GO-2nX6ui4zBRUht1z_mVjIVIVdDpaZM5UQDGa-22ClFB9RxzbvKAZxPWLWCi6ii5SsDaVUMGJwtExdixHAbZqv3P8C8IxNaE8T7t1FO6SowU5xb6-2K7B/3fm/MdA7uvyFRxSdBwia0i3loA/h0/Ax9ZUN3g83gO_jAuNOGNR9KH5SzJdVY2L_0tFva8e5E)
This is Rep. Adam Schiff, team. I have a lot to say. But first I have an important ask for you:

**[Will you split a contribution right now between Common Good VA and Charlie Crist’s campaign to defeat Ron DeSantis?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruSog2mCtFEQskeY4DRPutlgDHInfbbROjzPuWU87Vr3KcbkyxdLsQfqUFpeU_0UFWsbymcRmF4wIhXZgR9VRqC6atFNkkh8Hr12NzzmJnVbysh9sBhIERxQpkMeKnR7flyRgOjR7zalG6KAdYdGUMpY-MUwx0GVfPyumBQep6K_0nd3ZJCzRKQ3lE58fVyY5x_AJHhQJ8i4_7JlHV0PDgdJruEhpu0k2yunkwLfkGwaBDZlRxeeFE43Khh13XJSgefilwYhXRQqjDQHzjaw81D-mFUK33CNyK5TaBIcDKRkB/3fm/MdA7uvyFRxSdBwia0i3loA/h1/2JKwWMSo9M7FioaRUGQV-Wd1XwCs6-LEHZSXXxI_lNA) Every dollar is critical to helping defeat Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and helping my friend Charlie raise $15,000 before his fundraising deadline.**

I’ve known Charlie for a long time. We’ve served together in Congress and worked together on critical legislation to help families across America. He and I worked side by side to pass the COVID-19 relief packages and legislation to protect voting rights. I know his character. I’ve seen his work ethic. And he would fight for Floridians in the Governor’s mansion just as he has for years in Congress.

On the flip side, I know a lot about Ron DeSantis, too. Not through working together – but by seeing him stand side by side with the most dangerous president in history. Seeing him grin while signing voter suppression bills in Florida. **And by watching him jockey to use his platform to be the successor to Donald Trump in 2024.**

Things haven’t gotten much better since DeSantis left the House to become Governor of Florida. He’s put more attention into building his profile and trying to disenfranchise voters in his state than trying to help the people of Florida recover from the worst pandemic any of us have ever endured.

**It’s absolutely critical that we defeat DeSantis.** And I believe my friend Charlie is the one to beat him next year. But knowing the modern-day Republican Party, they are going to do everything they can to keep DeSantis in office and tear down Charlie as he seeks to represent the people of Florida.

**So right now, your contribution is critical. Charlie is ready to set the tone for the race and he needs your help to do it.[Please split a donation between Charlie’s campaign and Common Good VA today to help them hit their $15,000 goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruSog2mCtFEQskeY4DRPutlgKLzvHrMMf88QBmbYx66RJvQCy4wOa5nqKHFSPXlRhnIBQxPhHOY09h6RgOru56YhYVIzFLW5VRQK8YjxBKekTMg4INOlrxaPkYDHKVlLnJJIK7_h_F1_R0Z2HsnbO6V3ZCYSwOPRybyly1txHXuFx3GS8bDOINEqR41upqdvpw1yG6GPbrzraXHy1i1W_hUwxXRmifC-3f0LtiZEMX_NvKuDZjlLEkbePQ9w00xsWOExQNeSemOfn6BsdDRGPMHS2Lw4ZZMWuTRrORvmhBh0Z/3fm/MdA7uvyFRxSdBwia0i3loA/h2/ljnf4q_HsFNcce86lIbz7TdnYGd3CZGXG-Fl4V7ELXA)**

We need to flip Florida blue once again. And you can play a role in that today. Thank you for all you do.

\-- Adam Schiff
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruSog2mCtFEQskeY4DRPutlgDWdi4_BA_A6MDJKaVhvFFYF6hXAa6iZZ59tmHvaEnV8-O5Udn4QhYnm8blpC_gaBNz-I-UQs_-OZV-OaRSp2IEVF7WfSm31xA__U8EvubOkjvDu_H2bpfZdLXJHMTNLmOGfmvwZ1QrfjgDDtsIdokmWA2ipJf0U765D0Jey4ikiWTheL0aLtvxuz09sFFWeyStQ3IB8u3Zxy_4oYtcbh0eEq8MJYzx3K4reNDf7LxFsMZyWTsP5a-UjRkrdU0kH64ZcQrWfj51MWt08hJ76fw/3fm/MdA7uvyFRxSdBwia0i3loA/h3/4dS258GyMD308meMnuG6O9K1a58nYHtDqQeh-qvqqvg)

subject: I did more than any other President in history to secure our Southern Border

body:
Joe Biden is the only man to blame. | The largest number of illegal aliens in the history of our Country are pouring in by the millions.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58408398:Jun4el2DN:m:1:3253819041:E141A249E3D9349990F888D2571B7E6F:r)

Peter,

Joe Biden is FAILING.

The largest number of illegal aliens in the history of our Country are pouring in by the millions.

They are totally unchecked and unvetted. They can do whatever they want, and go wherever they want. Our Country is rapidly becoming unrecognizable. Murderers, drug dealers, and criminals of all shapes and sizes are a big part of this massive migration.

Tens of thousands of people are coming from all over the world - Haiti, many now from countries in Africa and Asia, and even more so now than South America.

I did more than any other President in history to secure our Southern Border, but now Biden has made it WIDE OPEN and vulnerable to the world. I need America's STRONGEST defenders to stand with me against the **Left's AMERICA LAST agenda.**

_*When you step up, you can claim a limited-time 500%-IMPACT offer._

I need America's STRONGEST defenders to stand with me against the Left's AMERICA LAST agenda. When you step up, you can claim a limited-time 500%-IMPACT offer. The corrupt Mainstream Media is giving almost no attention to what will be perhaps the greatest Crisis in the history of our Country. This is not just a Border Crisis, this is a Crisis Crisis, and I need your help. ** Thank you, Donald J. name: VP Mike Pence
subject: My pick for VA Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
It’s Vice President Mike Pence here. I wanted to reach out and talk about my friend and fellow conservative Jason Miyares. | |
---
|
---
Friend,

It’s Vice President Mike Pence here. I wanted to reach out and talk about my friend and fellow conservative Jason Miyares.

Jason is running for Attorney General in the great state of Virginia against a radical liberal dead set on giving criminals an easy pass.

We just can’t keep letting far-Left politicians drag our communities into violence and dystopia. We need to elect strong conservative leaders with America’s interests in mind.

Jason Miyares knows what makes America’s traditions and laws so sacred; his mother, Miriam Miyares, came to America from socialist Cuba with nothing but the clothes on her back.

Now, her son is a prosecutor, state delegate, husband, and father. The Miyares family embodies the American Dream and understands its sanctity.

Jason considers the rule of law in America to be the opposite of his mother’s socialist homeland... a shining example of justice, and a strong guard against radical ideologies.

And that’s why he’s Virginia’s best choice for Attorney General. Jason believes in the American Dream and knows best how to defend it...through Law and Order.
[**Will you stand with me and support Jason Miyares?**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=4eb197bfcdd64ae0a4a2390974718b7c&_e=ykYPRoTR0SpZTiKPV-ZjNI_W_so9Oz-KdZppCogY18gKOMJcu2YEeuRsFXbhfGQGMJTWKmBhmVNiTlRRvIc0qB6faObHtdT5nisTY91xtNR-kg-UJ8zaKbOEeMsIPMGPb3VCYVLoMEqQmdtV5Bt9gAM7uCX2sI65r2opSD4f9bjQAfv4-dG88GnXVOVT9tIcR657I5tzZnRGekbY7XRcDbid-OAyMKW6w2z_sB1CX8Oagn3LJklBkfNBbIY-Y2fvHEVgzWh60b_Az1cYWjUVIrSpEH38pmbxQyRIs_53PeMAJM32Fs-sYqEGv3AGtQD7ZqDgk8_CFVdkskYZSxDcCvqbm4byG1SKWWWMaGZSI5IJ9P9LbCZGV3asbWlMa-xwRe5zkDdCSQTAA3f1gDxIqsprBYyeBWOxVR1Xa96zwcsppn0eWY5i5TOTYoSC2yM4)
In just a few months since the election, it’s indicative all over our country and even the world... Weakness arouses evil.

In Virginia, AG Mark Herring’s tenure brought the highest homicide numbers since the 1990s. While the Democrats chant “Defund the Police,” **we need to defend the police and elect principled leaders.**
[**Support Jason’s campaign today!**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=4eb197bfcdd64ae0a4a2390974718b7c&_e=ykYPRoTR0SpZTiKPV-ZjNI_W_so9Oz-KdZppCogY18gKOMJcu2YEeuRsFXbhfGQGMJTWKmBhmVNiTlRRvIc0qB6faObHtdT5nisTY91xtNR-kg-UJ8zaKbOEeMsIPMGPb3VCYVLoMEqQmdtV5Bt9gAM7uCX2sI65r2opSD4f9bjQAfv4-dG88GnXVOVT9tIcR657I5tzZnRGekbY7XRcDbid-OAyMKW6w2z_sB1CX8Ngi39sW5f1AdsTWUwVRV0Qcnmex511CcFFolwmyQCblh47VviTsHPwxFkMLfAKgBSb-8LubAErapNRihtbHXVAJtIPcxJBZHPu4tlwwCV-iZB-NuwtpFf68M7q0q1bAM93hdn9qR37Iz_uKbNkoHimCMaKomh7GFs60Axtl_sPPMu3Fx0BPx7jb24aP0r1mvGKkJmkx_PC8l0LvrdbZKVZ)
Friend, thank you for helping Jason. When he wins in November, we’ll be on the path to restoring law and order in Virginia.

God bless,
VP Mike Pence
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=4eb197bfcdd64ae0a4a2390974718b7c&_e=ykYPRoTR0SpZTiKPV-ZjNI_W_so9Oz-KdZppCogY18gKOMJcu2YEeuRsFXbhfGQGMJTWKmBhmVNiTlRRvIc0qB6faObHtdT5nisTY91xtNR-kg-UJ8zaKbOEeMsIPMGPb3VCYVLoMEqQmdtV5Bt9gAM7uCX2sI65r2opSD4f9bjQAfv4-dG88GnXVOVT9tIcR657I5tzZnRGekbY7XRcDbid-OAyMKW6w2z_sB1CX8P7OMLWQV6n1GxAXcrs-IGJBj3IdEOKRJ3HeRGSwbZAc7F8EUQy-AdRk6Vb_dBudsrUZq8RjWJeeUQs1qY6UB9V1pFF_OVTHOvkekBsvkDG9gd0neCrxUYoniWQHT6fVfluUDJR8XXb4nbrhCm7B-F_epMHz7jimiE_g0EbD0KEeSR5_Vc-HkKxpNP0cjBFUdCJ5gOfwPsgYVK2J22U1Z22)

name: Rand Paul
subject: “I don’t know” is not an acceptable answer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58408419:JqwJql2NO:m:1:3253819041:D302AE131E7541DC11ED0C65AD2C9727:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last week I grilled Secretary Blinken on the August 29 drone strike that killed ten people.

I asked: Was the target an aid worker or an ISIS-K operative?

And Blinken responded, **" I don't know." **

You'd think our Secretary of State would kind of know before he offed someone with a predator drone. But if he didn't know - did the president?

**_Journalists should be asking: did Joe Biden personally approve the drone strike that killed 7 children and an aid worker?_**

**[I AGREE: STAND WITH RAND >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58408419:JqwJql2NO:m:1:3253819041:D302AE131E7541DC11ED0C65AD2C9727:r)**

It's absolutely appalling that the media and the Biden administration think they can sweep this under the rug.

We KNOW Obama authorized an entire chain of command to authorize individual drone killings. **_It 's not unreasonable to ask if Biden approved this killing of an aid worker and 7 children._**

I'm going to hold this administration's feet to the fire, but Peter, I need your help to keep this story alive.

Will you chip in now to keep the pressure on?
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58408419:JqwJql2NO:m:1:3253819041:D302AE131E7541DC11ED0C65AD2C9727:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58408419:JqwJql2NO:m:1:3253819041:D302AE131E7541DC11ED0C65AD2C9727:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58408419:JqwJql2NO:m:1:3253819041:D302AE131E7541DC11ED0C65AD2C9727:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58408419:JqwJql2NO:m:1:3253819041:D302AE131E7541DC11ED0C65AD2C9727:r)
We can't let this administration get away with this.

"I don't know" is just NOT an acceptable answer to a question that concerns not only the safety but the reputation of our nation.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
---

body:
1,800 miles and 7 days later... [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=81d2e2a5115e4d0fb4215f80012a3716&_e=1pk3VpXcdj28pk0PNrgPv27UpLRRWbASeHsfWnrVG87IMclIGvIHgN1Zo5P72qBQrRW8wm4Yp8laD24W9BSypyhPKCeWcGhl-dG7HVI6UN2I3lCJsGf_TeNJZM2ID0Ksr-03JEpT_anKZL7BPk9S48Y8lT5k84XAiHEyD3vCTMpuRJJdh8Xk7Egy2RZ03iNsoTnVYaSLsYbpr6sZjVZ9wCsPLgyrA6Tt5GNi59CVQGSiylz9TeDkyPxQ7MLr7YNblEDF5nAt_jZeq8Gi-FsKeC0kN-9p8WXO-jooCFX1jkSuJI79CJ-7ors3uECLQ-PfuI2It2e7Q7D3TWm5b3d1f8AHR6d9fLw8JtIoy7Q7SYmRG797slqLhHn2DBk6VJVo6CAAutLTcmiC_mcBkom9TSiT1BvDPfnR6vlPdQWfMeY%3D) | |

Peter,

_This is the latest email in our series that makes sure you get an authentic, behind the scenes look at my time in the White House and now on the campaign trail - straight from my team and me._

\--

We had an amazing week on the #ARFreedomTour meeting thousands of supporters from every corner of the state who care deeply about our future. Click below to watch our video capturing the week's moments on the bus, in diners, at rallies, and on boats! ⬇️
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=81d2e2a5115e4d0fb4215f80012a3716&_e=1pk3VpXcdj28pk0PNrgPv27UpLRRWbASeHsfWnrVG87IMclIGvIHgN1Zo5P72qBQrRW8wm4Yp8laD24W9BSypyhPKCeWcGhl-dG7HVI6UN2I3lCJsGf_TeNJZM2ID0Ksr-03JEpT_anKZL7BPk9S48Y8lT5k84XAiHEyD3vCTMpuRJJdh8Xk7Egy2RZ03iNsoTnVYaSLsYbpr6sZjVZ9wKvQct20IRTssy70pcZUn8AMKRuoE2KdIUne5jSdPvb9LBRucSJ77JFC4OKe2_9iubIkjvkN_ZKROQQlzB_TdoCY4UJD0X72q6nbt0z8Xjui5gfDaGRO-3Br69lE5qX1hrFiXao7t6YL9hW6RZlmXP9yPaWJ2nGLwFlrAM3D4ngTKfhzOawtdtj5fstUWR6EDNVQlNGogTeCky3tpfpm6Ro%3D)
I’ll never forget the feeling of pulling up to each stop on the tour. It was an honor to look out and see so many supporters packing restaurants, event venues, and even Lake Ouachita. The kind words and support meant so much!

1,800 miles and 7 days later, this week was one of my favorites so far. Together, we will defend our freedom and take Arkansas to the top!

God bless,
Sarah Huckabee Sanders

name: John Kasich
subject: It's concerning, but there's hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I have to tell you that I am very concerned about what I'm seeing happening in this country [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=5db7c20795d74189950dcc559fe7ddb6&_e=ukUX3IvFHcXBlWjdFJFNkFJj6Ud950CyZOpjoltWv5yHPlQUw3afmXYT6auAi8gRu7yq3_4GY_KoNMC6qzLaq5DhQffty3FMX3yiz_iwTj2WN3fp2-7TN9iqiWRoEwjxDlGK5lQI7rBkqcqLbQguPkIMrfZTs8vvrlnjlzqHhPePthTjFiifqT32JiLvP0MEFgZGeJDA7fVyPrAsSmpsg-OwRSUMnS5TYoocMbIiYMwigPLEm4z-Ze1oje7eXr8UiwkPWj1aPRFufGAVZEJu_g%3D%3D) Peter - I have to tell you that I am very concerned about what I'm seeing happening in this country with so many people sharing information online that they know to be false. [Watch my recent interview about this](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=5db7c20795d74189950dcc559fe7ddb6&_e=ukUX3IvFHcXBlWjdFJFNkFEjv5agTXOHq2Vwh7LzsCMjDfdpMxrLntxz5dDxCsixWa0d-eKcd2MCucxfJ9AfGPXsbigd2eJmomxnL6CODvlJKMxdw1beAsJoaqWWgH8kucCX1yu7PrpNyYeB0f1Z8g66_ZWKMJVB7nl8zTGAObPzXJ6s-SDIAwK9iOdTIu7nyC6kS6S91lejbKV1OoXTgDICexXDRwmyxoA2qKsG7iJuHWnyb7rBrW6YzQ7EWQxliq-iK_WROG63niO-EH_KeRs-sHWhtdn73qyIZAj2DOOBQoBqPBgnEsCycdiyRJL1). For example, take what we're seeing with a majority of Republican voters believing that Joe Biden was not legitimately elected President. It's one thing to not like the outcome but it's something much more concerning when, despite all of the legal challenges, the state audits and the investigations saying definitively that he won, that we have millions of people who believe otherwise. Now we know this is largely happening because former President Trump continues to peddle false conspiracy theories in an attempt to cling to his waning political power. It's worsened by the fact that so many GOP leaders don't have the courage to stand up to this rhetoric and tell their constituents and the American people the truth. And as we look ahead to the next election cycle, Republicans have a chance to retake the U.S. House majority. President Biden is really struggling and creating opportunities for the GOP. But what will our Republican candidates run on? **Are we satisfied with them only running AGAINST things?** What are they running to DO? That used to be how we measured the effectiveness of those who we send to represent us in Washington. [Watch my recent interview about this](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=5db7c20795d74189950dcc559fe7ddb6&_e=ukUX3IvFHcXBlWjdFJFNkFEjv5agTXOHq2Vwh7LzsCMjDfdpMxrLntxz5dDxCsixO3O2nwTxIuI8H6pmv717Cf8sm1VwrW-shN9tbPt25_ZfiHTl4llg9GIFRjng_7qgM7PeGF8g4GsfakgIyRrnlQwbIgS_Vq2YrTmMBstVoEhdPRT2dq31RHXsbKO19LLEEclhNLCDf7lmS1kipVyaziVnjoaflmZ3TX7VDWoo2D4QUivrlF2psextDfpgoTfR87pe6qRUx06Vkpx9IcAVvGcGdKiC2EQ4Qb6nFSy-8C99r27ZfFz1-5ipH34pr2Jb). **Peter, this is what I'm going to continue to talk about and we need more voices in the Republican Party doing the same**. I'm counting on your support to help us keep up this effort. **I'm out there every day raising awareness about these issues and doing what I can to make a positive impact** \- to restore sanity to Washington. [But I need your help to keep up the fight](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=5db7c20795d74189950dcc559fe7ddb6&_e=ukUX3IvFHcXBlWjdFJFNkI6uI7rxYifvKaxO4OvFRbGgrQ73iSAYLmnRtoz93XTUupxeS4z5-xU0AL9uNX6KOIt7Xjur2D_okMLqJoHmQmYcAykKgDa0qFPWwhVyC_BgmSl--VPAKyK3KSlV7sA_JerXzAwZBPVSmAIrTky1ivrVo4Lb-7MytX_2jttaEJwSq4Xeck_yOc8Blb69P0AFUaB68i3WvwXMYyNujTlmZafNozdi0g87_5ScZO5jrXY3xJiIOnfJ57GVorNDWHiXbA%3D%3D). The funds we raise go directly into our advocacy efforts and that's why I'm reaching out today to [ask you to consider making a donation right now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=5db7c20795d74189950dcc559fe7ddb6&_e=ukUX3IvFHcXBlWjdFJFNkI6uI7rxYifvKaxO4OvFRbGgrQ73iSAYLmnRtoz93XTUYSCUJZeCn4KjEslvej0asVn9L4Zcb3win1O-i_LhPnhcsUBcyLsNnLVwLf0RwflhdQdmp62SX3TGsbOc1fC8KxPwGBaN548vXeF5OyKYjNinJgxvJU_SU6yJSScozop33o465c6HAZNujl5NhY4zwmzraXNVh1JH-YwmhLICXf-5cKPTfJHAet9bNLhl1IUycCyzcWcVjWB8NQCaZVmx5g%3D%3D) to help. I'm counting on you. [Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=5db7c20795d74189950dcc559fe7ddb6&_e=ukUX3IvFHcXBlWjdFJFNkI6uI7rxYifvKaxO4OvFRbGgrQ73iSAYLmnRtoz93XTUmXF4WZi4ng7zlYarxgYR4AKXMb6SxS6bmd56HqAVVNC0ESVaAs60fQsKHW9k82x6UDjSw8ZAl9BBkKnQrsy8n2WzHSusyZbKNZbXR69hqMMQy5vEYemcSD95TAAhqIB-kqCJ53dpHhFcD8HKi42sTBIegyVX64gudyCfTr5D0mRvLP429js4jgWpsxfYWrNkRlLK7GDYBqzauZy9j6extw%3D%3D) I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country. Thank you! -John Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
candidate or candidate's committee.
www.JohnKasich.com
[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnkasich.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_s=5db7c20795d74189950dcc559fe7ddb6&_t=-pXHeo5JCjGnr9NaS8gUD8vBQQBr-sqeyYg1NEHGxZ4H4TWsj_ay51KankTmTgmIz62R173zAHa2YKm0oP2tKC8Hi0Z4tsGgT0GfOX7OiOFykFXGBrCjPLyr5n_diYU4Z0xnMFH9Jp52deotFlzeP1Yv4_00ei7LXyR97WQiV-o%3D)

| | Derek,

Last month, National Republicans announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin.

Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having.

**_Derek, Youngkin is climbing in the polls, and the experts at The Cook Political Report just moved the race to a toss-up._**

Here’s the good news: we’ve got a plan to turn out the voters we need. The bad news is that it’s going to cost us _a lot_ of money, and we’re running out of time.

[**We set a goal of raising $2 million online this month — we can’t run our grassroots field operation if we don’t have the funds. And the truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference.

With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to **every single corner of Virginia,** get mailers in **every single Virginia mailbox,** and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote.

clean_body: we have a new plan | | | = | | Derek, Last month, National Republicans announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin. Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having. Derek, Youngkin is climbing in the polls, and the experts at The Cook Political Report just moved the race to a toss-up. Here’s the good news: we’ve got a plan to turn out the voters we need. The bad news is that it’s going to cost us a lot of money, and we’re running out of time. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = And the truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference. With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to every single corner of Virginia, get mailers in every single Virginia mailbox, and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote. Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their endless resources, I need your help right now. = Thanks for being on my team, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Raising awareness around youth mental health:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36458646/308148639/-272948131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTk5YzExNi01YTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EX8yk0iPmf8N_Xtl-fPeYD6SnaBeQ02dRbjGSAAnXZs=&emci=f79ed3a4-581e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=0e99c116-5a1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=252045)
---
_Content warning: This email mentions suicide._ Friends, We need to make health care more accessible for _all_. We can’t do that if we put access to mental health care resources and treatment on the back burner. This is especially important in New Mexico. The heartbreaking truth of it is that we’ve seen high suicide rates in our state, including among young people. In recent years, 29 percent of deaths in young people between ages 15 and 24 were due to suicide. Devastatingly, we’ve also seen more young children die by suicide. This Suicide Prevention Awareness Month is a reminder of how critical it is to provide support and mental health services to every student in New Mexico who needs them. That’s why I’m so grateful to have worked with my colleagues in the Senate and the House to welcome more than $5 million in federal funding to New Mexico to help address this issue. This funding will help New Mexico increase awareness of mental health issues among students, train school personnel to detect and respond to mental health issues, and connect students to critical services. Students deserve the resources to get better, and to thrive. This funding for the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration’s Project AWARE will help make that a reality. Thank you for all you do for your family, neighbors, and community. I promise I will always fight to make sure you and your family have the best resources and care possible. —Martin _If you or someone you know needs somewhere to turn for help, the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline offers confidential counseling 24/7 at 1-800-273-8255 (English) or 1-888-628-9454 (Español). You can also find resources for youth[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36458647/308148640/1307401069?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTk5YzExNi01YTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EX8yk0iPmf8N_Xtl-fPeYD6SnaBeQ02dRbjGSAAnXZs=&emci=f79ed3a4-581e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=0e99c116-5a1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=252045)._

I'm writing today to follow-up on my email from 2 weeks ago regarding President Biden's forced vaccination efforts.

I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey, so I'm reaching back out to you with another opportunity to respond today.

Thank you,
Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jim Jordan
Date: Fri, Sep 10, 2021 at 5:30 PM
Subject: NO. VACCINE. MANDATE.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,

Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Peter,
Ever since liberals started pushing their message of “Defund the Police,” cities and towns all across the nation have seen a surge in violence. These criminals are emboldened by democrat rhetoric, and it’s time to stand up and fight back!

In Minneapolis, where violent crime has soared over the last year and a half, leftists Ilhan Omar and Keith Ellison are pushing an anti-police ballot initiative that would leave Minneapolis citizens **FAR LESS SAFE.**

[**Fight back against the left’s war on police: https://secure.winred.com/josh-hawley-committee/a_more_dangerous_minneapolis**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7b2ab977922d48159339bae61076e5cc&_e=21kr6hZpuYeVz6j3re4n6ljaOZRp_tAqhqrOD64TctEWcQ1UIyLoMikmnJmOhjT1auxdxl-tey0MBixp9mdEiS_Tzg6tHGG9GKV4X8pFh0KfqWcwYq_oSZA7BdFiE96yTM88OpqqnRcPEA9YYx4UmD8PnRj7uPzexjmYh2O0faK88QPZiEnsPoVNUARpYvqncTgdViexUdDwi287EElFmXzpFBLEDPqw_pIIeRl1tCHvSn9F9dKJKefk5dim78dKMupvSaVGxVFCXGJBlT2HDi5pELO8PM7CohrF9HL_ZPtziGBhJd3y1p6Y7ZU4OIF9phe7Q6eJCFEjAYizEXsjtZVmJtzKjGN5dLZmTQMvLW5YCu9N2DoXHwckZxYYGD8zUMcPBNf-tC9ksIaU2f7Ftc51movsCjuDMn7Ov0UBKJA%3D)

We need police now more than ever, and **we need MORE police officers, not LESS**. I introduced legislation that would hire 100,000 more police officers across the country.

More police on the streets will help keep citizens safe, deter criminals, and bring peace back to these violent cities. Police Officers deserve our respect and thanks, not the demonizing rhetoric they receive from the left!

body:
When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpOPIzlLucglbgpY6gU3QmBrPXIOWe26V9vaO0U-NleO_z-OL5QlEMzcrqxHlJ-5XQxGYF5zTYQQ5TXFZBRUH2Ar1n60vCEDmGPPONCcxQtmfB6l6CJ6xy1_4zlV0J54BbpZLn_-9RrOU1nzpYTtJBSnWWHKJ_6edaRTyDJUO2n0_OBRPuWnrEG9f0SHoX-AnujN5unlyLYCXNmnrbwIBMDj6ySTObCeL_d5eAG9Ydm7-CDNhaZBECFMGTpa1ptSDPDr0bf1w5B0wwjW4iO7ieqDwTUWHZnOFpJtft5S185yB6HGv22McrPnfZfYdGVEng/3fm/MZtFKLebTBG9Q7jz5g9UqA/h0/SER-3Ci3yiPbHraRRYgDrLCu1hNoCxrXl7RYiMBPyMA)
Derek -

In just a moment, **[I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Common Good VA.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpOPIzlLucglbgpY6gU3QmDUd9s5Ze5AnGz3c77jmT9Ogs8jdgdX6kDSEwPjYywCgEc4UW591Nh53wQd1vVKKQhRIXAqncHq1e4H6QSyQT7fjfScoaxFXbW0wVf5X8YKb-z5cs3mNhLiajbITd6lm-AEJOISR6b1T7wLinQQhvapDxn7ey20miD_OavaFcUgvbqIOKHBX4DATAl39X1QrY55bg8yhehjaKq8PmIUmmmvP03yoDle2zV_J8bfG62FIlP_81Zsi2ISS9hmGo1jXM_JlpEvZOM_Gw67wf_-jX6kIu7oC9d7CKD07yXUDU1Tag/3fm/MZtFKLebTBG9Q7jz5g9UqA/h1/pU9iWXyAlBPaSxI05s9zAXLRJUSc8tNhwCexfcl0H0k)** Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.

Here is the truth:

When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office.

Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona.

So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, **[I am asking you to split a $15 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA to help me fight back.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpR_BLfxYh6EDHcU_qXvIj5oKvJ4SXjXK_eQaUhp_N4LkfpyfVJ_JZBvAYrRYrc0ovPSGJYYQ3RwBywfTBXl0UtdrW_PsGJ_BOqEROaS5a-XKgPmXCrFCPWgRzAPq9JLgkM6GnWAcRcX98f8hNU0y6owhbhlAHPP_zPTK7jRLcsRxdrd5bs0FCdgIEOR7WLn0zJal-zY3Rw-NSKG05OcNRue9XUdw-viVHxUBlCuIvabx66a17HnLEk54aWbtNwx1vEPGjPxwlK0rF_rrCIrHu1ue_9_RfzmmkgALSVHy7l-DQfTXNgqkfmENI7EpVkxaw/3fm/MZtFKLebTBG9Q7jz5g9UqA/h2/mYFXdXwwOKEFLhurL7o5R2OMiQRzzR4m3WsDAlCCMvg)**

I know $15 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $15. And they’re hoping you do the same.

It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. So I am asking:

**[Can you please split a $15 contribution between my campaign and Common Good VA before this critical, end-of-quarter fundraising deadline comes to a close? We’ll put your donation right to work to help us win this campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpR_BLfxYh6EDHcU_qXvIj5oKvJ4SXjXK_eQaUhp_N4LIddz8b2pCY20g4T1LIZWKM0j41wfDMcXKLC-d1gNmmp49Bjx1Oq6sJXCPN0Efsl2tYy48doEygDY5pWH9hq8OQ7_AgqiNuKHzLkGsNdvj57Pp6TJTFzmyc_f_YdqzuugmHxsqA33tgjXQgxjE51-vpdfqdV2X6ABmq9GLCClV2jqM7HkQLDr9_nxuB7e3zyf8H_TmWsFmSKGumGIebyRZjOGeTqtWuE9YBahOuOXU3NemROjIDuFJ4Y7mZxjndgb_aSTQeXV-3-qVeXgDaNfWw/3fm/MZtFKLebTBG9Q7jz5g9UqA/h3/88zXm57fCmLCfW-pYso_4xJa3vNPLwl6kGrgWmCMaSk)** **[ Donate $15 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpR_BLfxYh6EDHcU_qXvIj5oKvJ4SXjXK_eQaUhp_N4LCtgNTSt8hBb4iB61a8_v9dm8ALK5atxSxGyaTQbizeWgjsRdN_wlfH7v6ykxDG1Vn64FN7wN1F1LEk4pHXOS4LEG-Plh9UsCbaIV90rwtAOuBThrYMo30n0np1_iqq-gXHUvwFMhl4fj395jYO0oFHgqbIk4VoACuowyFm__yKfSA9LYgp__PiyE6khu6ZC8-Z7DGneSGBAles4QUxGvRazDXzi04j-LnABB3BYkvGkCVcT-j0BdBTP6iCtqiigLPzVErZzsKEcUqHjqmyduYw/3fm/MZtFKLebTBG9Q7jz5g9UqA/h4/IOGVncOy_sJg-w6PKKENNOVl5XLvs7xgWDBnb0fXK1k)

clean_body: When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning. | | | Derek - In just a moment, Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here is the truth: When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office. Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona. So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I know $15 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $15. And they’re hoping you do the same. It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. So I am asking: Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot. \- Mark | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

body:
Do you CONDEMN House Republicans for their destructive political games?
| | | _**FOX NEWS ALERT: Conservative group launches $2 million dollar attack to derail Dems ' agenda**_ | [**
15,000 URGENT RESPONSES REQUESTED:**

Democrats are hard at work fighting for America's future.

But Republicans are DEAD SET on complete opposition!

This is EXACTLY what Donald Trump wants! To BLOCK our progress and DEFEAT our Democratic House Majority.

**So let us know: Do you CONDEMN House Republicans for their destructive political games?******](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe0~)
---|---|---

We're so proud of our Democrats.

They **SUPPORT** our voting rights.

They **SUPPORT** a fairer economy.

And they **SUPPORT** a greener, more sustainable future.

But Republicans are more focused on playing silly political games.

In fact, a GOP special interest group with deep pockets just launched a **$2 MILLION** campaign targeting our most vulnerable House Democrats with vicious attack ads, so they can retake the Majority and stop all our progress.

**House Republicans are DEAD SET on their strategy of complete and unwavering opposition.**

We must overcome the GOP in their attempts to defeat our House Majority -- but we urgently need to know where our supporters stand to do so.

**So we need to know: Do you CONDEMN House Republicans for their destructive political games?**
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe0~)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Outright treason
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
General Milley must be investigated. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=645b3b1338&u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=657566f434)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4ea7524304&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

That's how people are describing General Mark Milley's secret phone calls with the Communist Chinese military leadership.

Never in our nation’s history has a military general acted as a spy for a foreign hostile government. I call this treason and I call for an immediate court martial.

America's highest-ranking military advisor aided and provided comfort to the Communist Chinese Party while President Trump was in the White House.

He said he'd warn them if President Trump was about to take action against China.

I won't accept a military "leader" who conspires with foreign adversaries. It's long past time to weed the rotten apples out of America's military leadership.

[**We must make an example out of General Milley, and I'm counting on your generous contributions to my reelection campaign so I can battle to do just that**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=13a167bbc9&e=645b3b1338).

It's plain as day to me that General Milley \-- at the very least -- failed to uphold his oath of office.

At worst, he should be tried for treason, court-martialed, and punished for his alleged crimes.

That's why tough leaders in Congress like me are asking serious questions.

We cannot let rogue military officials undermine America's national security.

[**Will you help me keep the entrenched bureaucrats in the White House and DOD in check with a contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=82760649f6&e=645b3b1338)?

Please understand, Fellow Patriot, General Milley and his friends in the DOD _are_ the Deep State that President Trump and I battled for years.

Taking action against them is a dangerous move politically.

They will almost certainly retaliate, as the Deep State RINOs have already promised, by trying to throw me out of office.

[**That's why it's so crucial that I have your support today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2c8280c687&e=645b3b1338).

[**A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or more to my reelection campaign will help me retain my seat in Congress so I can hold General Milley and his powerful friends accountable for their misdeeds**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c749f6f127&e=645b3b1338).

Thank you in advance.
---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=52b4802752&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** Many people are saying that General Mark Milley committed "outright treason" by cozying up to the Communist Chinese during the Trump presidency.

[**_Chip into my reelection campaign today and help me get to the bottom of this grave allegation_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=72400ba118&e=645b3b1338).

---

name: China Watch
subject: CHINA and the TALIBAN: a match made in hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:

name: Emily
subject: Not just another fundraising email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=972%2E3611125%2Exw5usi ][IMG]

Hey folks,

Emily here. I’m reaching out because we’ll be emailing you a lot over the
next few days to ask for your help reaching our $100,000 FEC fundraising
goal -- in just 5 days!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4383?t=1007&akid=972%2E3611125%2Exw5usi ]Can you chip in any amount now to help us meet our goal and flip this
open Senate seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4383?t=1008&akid=972%2E3611125%2Exw5usi ]Donate Now

Listen, we’re not spamming your inbox for the fun of it. We know it can be
overwhelming, but the thing is -- we can’t do this without you.

That’s no exaggeration folks, I mean it. It’s donors like you,
hardworking people who chip in what they can, when they can who power our
campaign.

Tim doesn’t have GOP billionaire backers or the option to self-fund his
campaign like his Republican opponents do. We have something better -- we
have YOU.

That’s what this race comes down to -- who do you trust to cut workers in
on the deal? Tim, who’s been on the picket line and in union halls his
whole life, or his millionaire Republican opponents who only want to line
their own pockets?

Tim and our team have so much work to do to ensure Ohio’s best days lie
ahead and everyone gets a fair shot. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4383?t=1009&akid=972%2E3611125%2Exw5usi ]Can we count on you to chip in
toward our goal so we can flip Ohio and expand our Democratic Senate
majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4383?t=1010&akid=972%2E3611125%2Exw5usi ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4384?t=1011&akid=972%2E3611125%2Exw5usi ]Donate $50

Let’s get to work,

Emily
Digital Fundraising Director
Team Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=972%2E3611125%2Exw5usi ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=972%2E3611125%2Exw5usi ]click here.

| Friends, Have you been watching the news lately?

---

| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzgyODEzNzM4MjIzNTM5NzYzJmM9ejJ2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj03MzQ1MzUyNjYmZD1oNnk1ejN4.hPmnZvERew9BrmsUv1HswdLoa4rGo2VB2PFtFoAtXw4)

| |

| Doesn't it seem like our nation has faced crisis after crisis since Joe Biden moved into the White House? **R****ising inflation, rising gas and food prices, the crisis at the border, the devastation caused by the hasty Afghanistan withdrawal** **\-- just to name a few.** Meanwhile, President Biden is trying to change the subject by proposing a broad vaccine mandate on NH businesses and their employees that will lead to the firing of NH healthcare workers. Well, your NH Senate Republicans are fighting back! In case you missed it, this past week we sent a letter to NH's all-Democratic congressional delegation demanding that they stand up to the Biden Administration and oppose his plan to fire NH healthcare workers. **We cannot allow this Administration to distract us from the real problems facing our nation by creating a new problems that benefit them politically**. The NH Senate Republicans are doing all that we can to keep this administration honest, but we need your help! The midterm elections in 2022 are crucially important for the future of our state and our nation. [Will you help send a message to President Biden by chipping in $25, $50 or even $100 to support our Republican candidates? (secure link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzgyODEzNzM4MjIzNTM5NzYzJmM9ejJ2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj03MzQ1MzUyNjkmZD1iN3YyajJl.fl9Sgu-_tl87gWKYCk33_05BNT9gsgzcjG-vdn_0GvU) Thank you, NH Senate Republicans P.S. We can't vote the Biden Administration out of office for a few more years, but we can **s********how them that we are united as conservatives and we are angry** about the direction that they are taking us in!

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friends, Have you been watching the news lately? | | | | | | Doesn't it seem like our nation has faced crisis after crisis since Joe Biden moved into the White House? Rising inflation, rising gas and food prices, the crisis at the border, the devastation caused by the hasty Afghanistan withdrawal \-- just to name a few. Meanwhile, President Biden is trying to change the subject by proposing a broad vaccine mandate on NH businesses and their employees that will lead to the firing of NH healthcare workers. Well, your NH Senate Republicans are fighting back! In case you missed it, this past week we sent a letter to NH's all-Democratic congressional delegation demanding that they stand up to the Biden Administration and oppose his plan to fire NH healthcare workers. We cannot allow this Administration to distract us from the real problems facing our nation by creating a new problems that benefit them politically. The NH Senate Republicans are doing all that we can to keep this administration honest, but we need your help! The midterm elections in 2022 are crucially important for the future of our state and our nation. Thank you, NH Senate Republicans P.S. We can't vote the Biden Administration out of office for a few more years, but we can s****how them that we are united as conservatives and we are angry about the direction that they are taking us in! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03302 United States | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

name: Brent Hennrich for WA03
subject: It's All About Healthcare.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Brent Hennrich For Washington**](https://www
body:
Healthcare is taking care of the whole person. Dental, Vision, Auditory, Reproductive care, Mental Health- these are all parts of the whole
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fdNmP9tMA/c?w=6jsmvVYFAP7gYcIgZ9lWNkirDL4DIox7o5dPNHz4QY4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vc28vZmRObVA5dE1BP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON!
---
| | [](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fdNmP9tMA/c?w=VLG5FEmKDl6P25V_X-Ir58GWvsXFqDzPpJZJl4cA-og.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9icmVudGhlbm5yaWNoLmNvbSIsInIiOiJkNTM5MDFhMi1jNTZmLTQ0NTktNGE5MS1mOWM1NGZlMTdiMzEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| | Healthcare is taking care of the whole person. Dental, Vision, Auditory, Reproductive care, Mental Health- these are all parts of the whole of healthcare, and that list is by no means complete.
---
| |
---
| Healthcare isn’t just access to Doctor appointments. It isn’t simply medications, or treatments.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fdNmP9tMA/c?w=ImTXGhlrktrjwdf0DHg-v0RjqwetebeQX4eaY_UMkCc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPW1haWw5MjQmYW1vdW50PTI1MCIsInIiOiIyYzQ4NWMzYS02M2FjLTRmZGItMDFmZi00YzYzMGRmOTk2NDciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| | The current United States healthcare system is broken: We now spend 18% of our entire GDP (that’s EVERY dollar) on healthcare in the US, and many millions of people in our country live without access to the care they need. Further, those who receive the care they need often have to claim bankruptcy and turn to crowdfunding platforms like "Go Fund Me" to pay for lifesaving services. My second daughter Addison died hours after her birth. My wife and I left the hospital with a heavy emotional burden, as well as a major financial burden. Many American families have experienced what happens after a tragic event, and my family is among them. This “double trauma” is by no means unique - many American families have had similar issues- this shouldn’t happen. No family should bear such a burden. As a member of Congress I will work with the best and brightest minds and practitioners in healthcare towards building a better system. I will vote for reforms that make progress towards universal healthcare coverage, whether those changes are large or small-[ and I need your help to get there. ](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fdNmP9tMA/c?w=F44tGrfaQBIaBQf-aajIjwxpJQDBRGXbcWTyKCy_d6o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPW1haWw5MjQmYW1vdW50PTI1MCIsInIiOiI0MmNmZTFkYS1mZmFmLTQ1YjEtMjU4OS02ZWNiNmZkMDliMDEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) Every aspect of our lives depends on our health and far too many PEOPLE suffer needlessly from the inequity that is built into our current national healthcare “non-system.
